31619.title: Political Sentiment and Innovation: Evidence from Patenters
31619.zh_title: 政治情绪与创新：来自专利持有者的证据
31619.authors: Joseph Engelberg, Runjing Lu, William Mullins, Richard R. Townsend
31619.abstract: We document political sentiment effects on US inventors. Democratic inventors are more likely to patent (relative to Republicans) after the 2008 election of Obama but less likely after the 2016 election of Trump. These effects are 2-3 times as strong among politically active partisans and are present even within firms over time. Patenting by immigrant inventors (relative to non-immigrants) also falls following Trump’s election. Finally, we show partisan concentration by technology class and firm. This concentration aggregates up to more patenting in Democrat-dominated technologies (e.g., Biotechnology) compared to Republican-dominated technologies (e.g., Weapons) following the 2008 election of Obama.
31619.zh_abstract: 我们记录了政治情绪对美国发明家的影响。民主党发明家在2008年奥巴马当选后更有可能申请专利（相对于共和党人），但在2016年特朗普当选后则不太可能。这些影响在政治活跃的党派人士中强2-3倍，并且即使在企业内部也随时间存在。移民发明家（相对于非移民）的专利申请在特朗普当选后也有所下降。最后，我们展示了按技术类别和公司划分的党派集中度。这种集中度累积起来，导致在2008年奥巴马当选后，民主党主导的技术（例如生物技术）的专利申请比共和党主导的技术（例如武器）更多。
31619.meta: Programs：LS, POL, PR；JEL：D72, J24, M5, O31

31618.title: Greed? Profits, Inflation, and Aggregate Demand
31618.zh_title: 贪婪？利润、通胀与总需求
31618.authors: Florin O. Bilbiie, Diego R. Känzig
31618.abstract: We investigate whether corporate profits can drive elevated inflation through the interplay of income distribution dynamics and aggregate demand—our narrow definition of the “greed” narrative—within the New Keynesian framework. We first derive an analytical condition for profits to be procyclical and thus inflationary in response to demand expansions. Yet when distributional mechanisms are of the essence, as under the greed view, a conundrum emerges: procyclical profits accruing to low-MPC asset-holders imply a dampening of aggregate demand, yielding deflationary forces—the opposite of greedflation. Adding capital investment undoes part of this as it delivers aggregate-demand amplification even under procyclical profits, but the deflationary effects of the latter are still operating in a compensating way. Countercyclical income risk can deliver the amplified inflationary response; yet since this operates through a precautionary-saving channel and not profits, it is still inconsistent with the narrative directly attributing inflation to corporate greed.
31618.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在新凯恩斯主义框架下，企业利润能否通过收入分配动态与总需求的相互作用（即我们对“贪婪”叙事的狭义定义）来推动通胀上升。我们首先推导出一个分析条件，说明利润何时具有顺周期性，从而在需求扩张时引发通胀。然而，当分配机制至关重要时（正如贪婪观点所认为的那样），一个难题出现了：流向低边际消费倾向资产持有者的顺周期利润意味着总需求受到抑制，从而产生通缩压力——这与贪婪通胀恰恰相反。加入资本投资部分抵消了这一效应，因为即使在利润顺周期的情况下，它也能放大总需求，但利润的通缩效应仍在以补偿方式发挥作用。反周期的收入风险可以产生放大的通胀反应；然而，由于这是通过预防性储蓄渠道而非利润渠道发挥作用，因此仍然与直接将通胀归因于企业贪婪的叙事不一致。

31617.title: Protests
31617.authors: Davide Cantoni, Andrew Kao, David Y. Yang, Noam Yuchtman
31617.abstract: Citizens have long taken to the streets to demand change, expressing political views that may otherwise be suppressed. Protests have produced change at local, national, and international scales, including spectacular moments of political and social transformation. We document five new empirical patterns describing 1.2 million protest events across 218 countries between 1980 and 2020. First, autocracies and weak democracies experienced a trend break in protests during the Arab Spring. Second, protest movements also rose in importance following the Arab Spring. Third, protest movements geographically diffuse over time, spiking to their peak, before falling off. Fourth, a country’s year-to-year economic performance is not strongly correlated with protests; individual values are predictive of protest participation. Fifth, the US, China, and Russia are the most over-represented countries by their share of academic studies. We discuss each pattern’s connections to the existing literature and anticipate paths for future work.
31617.zh_abstract: 长期以来，公民们走上街头要求变革，表达那些可能被压制的政治观点。抗议活动在地方、国家和国际层面带来了变革，包括政治和社会转型的壮观时刻。我们记录了描述1980年至2020年间218个国家120万起抗议事件的五个新实证模式。第一，威权政体和脆弱民主国家在阿拉伯之春期间经历了抗议活动的趋势性转折。第二，抗议运动在阿拉伯之春之后的重要性也显著上升。第三，抗议运动在时间上呈现地理扩散，达到顶峰后逐渐消退。第四，一个国家逐年的经济表现与抗议活动之间没有强相关性；个人价值观可以预测抗议参与。第五，美国、中国和俄罗斯在学术研究中所占份额被过度代表。我们讨论了每个模式与现有文献的联系，并展望了未来研究的路径。

31616.title: CEO Gender Bias in the Formation of Firm-to-Firm Transactions
31616.zh_title: 企业间交易形成中的CEO性别偏见
31616.authors: Yutaro Izumi, Hitoshi Shigeoka, Masayuki Yagasaki
31616.abstract: This study examines an unexplored channel of female CEO disadvantage: CEO gender bias in forming business networks. Using supplier-buyer linkage data from Japanese firms, we find that CEOs of the same gender are more likely to trade than those of the opposite gender, particularly in small and medium-sized rms. As most CEOs are male, this same-gender bias restricts the trading opportunities for female CEOs compared with their male counterparts. Our CEO survey revealed frictions that hinder cross-gender encounters, suggesting that creating venues to promote female-male CEO interactions could effectively achieve gender equity through expanding the business networks of female CEOs.
31616.zh_abstract: 本研究探讨了女性CEO劣势的一个未被探索的渠道：在形成商业网络中的CEO性别偏见。利用日本企业的供应商-买家关联数据，我们发现同性别的CEO之间比异性别的CEO更有可能进行交易，尤其是在中小企业中。由于大多数CEO是男性，这种同性别偏见限制了女性CEO相对于男性同行的交易机会。我们的CEO调查揭示了阻碍跨性别接触的摩擦，这表明创造促进男女CEO互动的场所可以通过扩大女性CEO的商业网络来有效实现性别平等。

31615.title: Clean Growth
31615.abstract: We provide a spatial theory of clean growth to assess the global impact of the rise of renewable energy. We model the details of the combined production and transmission network of electricity (“the grid”) that determine the supply and losses of energy in space. The local rate of clean energy adoption depends on learning-by-doing, the global electricity and trade network, and regional comparative advantage in renewable resources. We use the model to measure the aggregate and spatial implications of clean growth. We find that the world’s power system is likely to be dominated by renewables by 2040 in a range of scenarios, with substantial welfare gains, even in the absence of policy. Incorporating policy, we find that the US Inflation Reduction Act significantly accelerates renewable uptake, and generates substantial economic benefits. In addition, planned grid improvements lower prices substantially in many areas of the US, justifying their cost of construction.
31615.zh_abstract: 我们提供了一个清洁增长的空间理论，以评估可再生能源崛起的全球影响。我们对决定能源在空间上供给和损耗的电力联合生产与传输网络（即“电网”）的细节进行了建模。本地清洁能源采用率取决于干中学、全球电力和贸易网络以及区域在可再生资源上的比较优势。我们利用该模型衡量了清洁增长的总体和空间影响。我们发现，在一系列情景下，即使没有政策干预，到2040年世界电力系统很可能由可再生能源主导，并带来显著的福利收益。结合政策因素，我们发现美国《通胀削减法案》显著加速了可再生能源的采用，并产生了巨大的经济效益。此外，计划中的电网改进大幅降低了美国许多地区的电价，证明了其建设成本的合理性。
31615.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, ITI；JEL：F11, Q40, Q41, Q42, Q43, R13

31613.title: Managing Mental Accounts: Payment Cards and Consumption Expenditures
31613.zh_title: 管理心理账户：支付卡与消费支出
31613.abstract: Does mental accounting matter for total consumption expenditures? We exploit a unique setting in which individuals exogenously received a new credit card, without requesting one. Using random variation in the time of receipt we show that individuals temporarily increase total consumption expenditure by making purchases with the new card without reducing spending on the others. We do not observe a corresponding increase in indebtedness. Total consumption expenditure rises even for the least liquidity-constrained individuals. The evidence is consistent with consumers treating methods of payment as nonfungible budget categories, as suggested by models of mental accounting and narrow bracketing.
31613.zh_abstract: 心理账户对总消费支出是否重要？我们利用一个独特的情境，即个体在未主动申请的情况下外生地收到了一张新信用卡。利用收到时间的随机变化，我们表明个体通过使用新卡进行购买而暂时增加了总消费支出，同时并未减少其他卡上的支出。我们没有观察到相应的负债增加。即使对于流动性约束最小的个体，总消费支出也会上升。这些证据与消费者将支付方式视为不可替代的预算类别的观点一致，正如心理账户和窄框架模型所建议的那样。
31613.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, EFG, LS, ME；JEL：D01, D12, D31, D91, D99, G02, G40, G41, G5, G50, G51, G53

31612.title: An Experimental Evaluation of Deferred Acceptance: Evidence from Over 100 Army Officer Labor Markets
31612.zh_title: 延迟接受算法的实验评估：来自超过100个陆军军官劳动力市场的证据
31612.authors: Jonathan M.V. Davis, Kyle Greenberg, Damon Jones
31612.abstract: Internal labor markets are increasingly important for matching workers to jobs within organizations. We present evidence from a randomized trial that compares matching workers to jobs using the deferred acceptance (DA) algorithm to the traditional manager-directed matching process. Our setting is the U.S. Army’s internal labor market, which matches over 14,000 officers to units annually. We find that DA reduces administrative burden and increases match quality as measured by reduced justified envy, increased truthful preference reporting, and officers’ and units’ preferences over their matches. The overall impact of DA on officer retention and performance in the two years after officers started their new jobs is limited by strategic preference coordination between officers and units. However, DA leads to significant improvements in officer retention and promotions in markets with inexperienced managers. Our findings suggest that cross-market communication between agents in internal labor markets can attenuate the benefits of strategy-proof matching algorithms.
31612.zh_abstract: 内部劳动力市场在组织内部将工人与工作岗位匹配方面日益重要。我们展示了一项随机试验的证据，该试验比较了使用延迟接受算法将工人与工作岗位匹配与传统管理者主导的匹配过程。我们的背景是美国陆军的内部劳动力市场，该市场每年将超过14000名军官匹配到各个单位。我们发现，延迟接受算法减少了行政负担，并提高了匹配质量，具体表现为减少了合理的嫉妒、增加了真实偏好报告，以及军官和单位对其匹配结果的偏好。在军官开始新工作后的两年内，延迟接受算法对军官留任和绩效的总体影响受到军官与单位之间战略性偏好协调的限制。然而，在管理者经验不足的市场中，延迟接受算法显著改善了军官的留任和晋升。我们的研究结果表明，内部劳动力市场中代理人之间的跨市场沟通可能会削弱防策略匹配算法的益处。

31611.title: Psychosocial Constraints, Impact Heterogeneity and Spillovers in a Multifaceted Graduation Program in Kenya
31611.zh_title: 肯尼亚多层面脱贫项目中的心理社会约束、影响异质性与溢出效应
31611.authors: Geyi Zheng, Michael Carter, Nathan Jensen, Laurel Krovetz
31611.abstract: Poverty reduction programs modeled on BRAC's graduation approach build up both tangible productive assets and intangible psychosocial assets such as self-confidence and the aspiration for upward mobility. The goal of this paper is to better understand how psychosocial factors operate and shape the impact of graduation programs. After deriving a set of hypotheses about the impacts of psychosocial constraints from a dynamic optimization model of the choice between a low income, casual wage-labor occupation and a higher earning entrepreneurial activity, this paper exploits a randomized controlled trial of a graduation program implemented in the pastoralist regions of Northern Kenya. Key empirical findings include that the estimated highly favorable average treatment effects disguise substantial heterogeneity, with beneficiaries who began with severe depressive symptoms gaining little from the program. The RCT's saturation design also allows us to identify substantial spillover effects onto the asset accumulation of women who were not enrolled in the graduation program. Spillovers are also estimated to positively affect non-beneficiary women's preference for upward economic mobility, providing a plausible explanation for their accumulation of capital despite no direct support from the graduation program. The paper draws out the implications of these findings for the cost-effective design and implementation of graduation programs.
31611.zh_abstract: 以BRAC脱贫方法为蓝本的减贫项目既积累有形生产性资产，也积累无形的心理社会资产，如自信和向上流动的愿望。本文旨在更好地理解心理社会因素如何运作并塑造脱贫项目的影响。在从动态优化模型中推导出一组关于心理社会约束影响的假设后（该模型模拟了在低收入、临时工资劳动职业与高收入创业活动之间的选择），本文利用在肯尼亚北部牧区实施的一个脱贫项目的随机对照试验。关键实证发现包括：估计出的非常有利的平均处理效应掩盖了显著的异质性，那些最初有严重抑郁症状的受益者从项目中获益甚少。该随机对照试验的饱和设计还使我们能够识别出对未参加脱贫项目的女性资产积累的显著溢出效应。据估计，溢出效应还积极影响了非受益女性对向上经济流动的偏好，这为她们尽管没有直接从脱贫项目中获得支持却仍能积累资本提供了合理解释。本文阐述了这些发现对脱贫项目成本效益设计和实施的意义。

31610.title: Firm Export Dynamics in Interdependent Markets
31610.zh_title: 相互依存市场中的企业出口动态
31610.authors: Alonso Alfaro-Urena, Juanma Castro-Vincenzi, Sebastian Fanelli, Eduardo Morales
31610.abstract: We estimate a model of firm export dynamics featuring cross-country complementarities. The firm decides where to export by solving a dynamic combinatorial discrete choice problem, for which we develop a solution algorithm that overcomes the computational challenges inherent to the large dimensionality of its state space and choice set. According to our estimated model, firms enjoy cost reductions when exporting to countries geographically or linguistically close to each other, or that share deep trade agreements. Countries, especially small ones, sharing these traits with attractive destinations receive significantly more exports than in the absence of complementarities.
31610.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个具有跨国互补性的企业出口动态模型。企业通过解决一个动态组合离散选择问题来决定出口目的地，为此我们开发了一种求解算法，克服了其状态空间和选择集维度高所带来的计算挑战。根据我们估计的模型，当企业向地理或语言相近、或共享深度贸易协定的国家出口时，会享受成本降低。与没有互补性的情况相比，与有吸引力的目的地共享这些特征的国家（尤其是小国）获得的出口显著更多。

31609.title: From Addiction to Aggression: The Spillover Effects of Opioid Policies on Intimate Partner Violence
31609.zh_title: 从成瘾到攻击：阿片类药物政策对亲密伴侣暴力的溢出效应
31609.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Bilge Erten, Pinar Keskin, Shuo Zhang
31609.abstract: Substance abuse is a major risk factor for intimate partner violence (IPV). We investigate how a key supply-side intervention – the abuse-deterrent reformulation of a widely-diverted opioid, OxyContin – affected IPV. Our results indicate counties with greater baseline rates of prescription opioid usage experienced relatively larger declines in IPV after OxyContin’s reformulation. The reformulation reduced IPV only in states with small illicit drug markets, while states with large illicit drug markets experienced increased heroin-involved IPV due to substitution towards illicit opioids. Our results underscore the importance of identifying populations at high risk of substitution to illicit opioids and moderating this risk with evidence-based policies.
31609.zh_abstract: 药物滥用是亲密伴侣暴力的主要风险因素。我们研究了一项关键的供给侧干预措施——对广泛被滥用的阿片类药物奥施康定进行防滥用配方改革——如何影响亲密伴侣暴力。我们的结果表明，在奥施康定配方改革后，处方阿片类药物使用基线率较高的县，亲密伴侣暴力出现了相对较大的下降。该改革仅在非法药物市场规模较小的州减少了亲密伴侣暴力，而在非法药物市场规模较大的州，由于转向非法阿片类药物，涉及海洛因的亲密伴侣暴力有所增加。我们的结果强调了识别转向非法阿片类药物高风险人群，并通过循证政策来调节这一风险的重要性。
31609.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：H0, I12, I18, K0

31608.title: Distributional Equity in the Employment and Wage Impacts of Energy Transitions
31608.zh_title: 能源转型对就业和工资影响的分配公平性
31608.authors: Ben Gilbert, Hannah Gagarin, Ben Hoen
31608.abstract: We use restricted-access, geocoded data on the near-universe of workers in 23 U.S. states in order to quantify the impact of wind energy development on local earnings and employment, by race, ethnicity, sex, and educational attainment. We find the largest relative impacts for workers without a high school education, or workers with a college education, in addition to other systematic differences across sub-populations. We compare these results to estimates using county aggregates of the worker-level data, such as can be obtained using publicly available data. We find that (a) county-level estimates are dramatically dampened relative to geocoded worker-level estimates, and (b) the degree of bias differs by sub-population such that qualitative comparisons of impacts are not consistent using restricted-access data versus county-level data for most sub-populations. We discuss implications for achieving equity goals within energy transition policies.
31608.zh_abstract: 我们使用美国23个州近乎所有工人的受限访问地理编码数据，按种族、民族、性别和教育程度量化风能发展对当地收入和就业的影响。我们发现，除各子群体之间存在其他系统性差异外，对未接受高中教育或接受大学教育的工人的相对影响最大。我们将这些结果与使用县级工人数据汇总（例如可从公开数据中获得）的估计值进行比较。我们发现：(a) 县级估计值相对于地理编码工人层面的估计值显著减弱，并且 (b) 偏差程度因子群体而异，因此对于大多数子群体，使用受限访问数据与县级数据得出的影响定性比较并不一致。我们讨论了在能源转型政策中实现公平目标的意义。

31607.title: Biased Surveys
31607.abstract: We find evidence suggesting that surveys of professional forecasters are biased by strategic incentives. First, we find that individual forecasts overreact to idiosyncratic information but underreact to common information. Second, we show that this bias is not present in forecasts data that is not subject to strategic incentives. We show that our evidence is consistent with a model of strategic diversification incentives in forecast reporting. Our results caution against the use of surveys of forecasts as a direct measure of expectations, as this would overestimate the likely deviations from rational expectations, the information precision and the degree of disagreement.
31607.zh_abstract: 我们发现有证据表明，专业预测者的调查受到战略激励的偏差影响。首先，我们发现个体预测对特质信息反应过度，但对共同信息反应不足。其次，我们表明这种偏差不存在于不受战略激励影响的预测数据中。我们证明，我们的证据与预测报告中战略多元化激励的模型一致。我们的结果警示，不要将预测调查直接用作预期的衡量标准，因为这会高估与理性预期的可能偏离、信息精度以及分歧程度。
31607.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：C53, D84, E31, E37, E70

31606.title: Market Response to Racial Uprisings
31606.zh_title: 市场对种族起义的反应
31606.authors: Bocar A. Ba, Roman Rivera, Alexander Whitefield
31606.abstract: Do investors anticipate that demands for racial equity will impact companies? We explore this question in the context of the Black Lives Matter (BLM) movement—the largest racially motivated protest movement in U.S. history—and its effect on the U.S. policing industry using a novel dataset on publicly traded firms contracting with the police. It is unclear whether the BLM uprisings were likely to increase or decrease market valuations of firms contracting heavily with police because of the increased interest in reforming the police, fears over rising crime, and pushes to “defund the police”. We find, in contrast to the predictions of economics experts we surveyed, that in the three weeks following incidents triggering BLM uprisings, policing firms experienced a stock price increase of seven percentage points relative to the stock prices of nonpolicing firms in similar industries. In particular, firms producing surveillance technology and police accountability tools experienced higher returns following BLM activism–related events. Furthermore, policing firms’ fundamentals, such as sales, improved after the murder of George Floyd, suggesting that policing firms’ future performances bore out investors' positive expectations following incidents triggering BLM uprisings. Our research shows how—despite BLM’s calls to reduce investment in policing and explore alternative public safety approaches—the financial market has translated high-profile violence against Black civilians and calls for systemic change into shareholder gains and additional revenues for police suppliers.
31606.zh_abstract: 投资者是否预期种族公平的要求会影响公司？我们以“黑人的命也是命”运动——美国历史上规模最大的种族动机抗议运动——为背景，利用一个关于与警方签订合同的上市公司的新数据集，探讨了这个问题及其对美国警务行业的影响。目前尚不清楚“黑人的命也是命”起义是可能增加还是减少与警方签订大量合同的公司的市场估值，原因在于对警务改革兴趣的增加、对犯罪率上升的担忧以及“撤资警察”的推动。我们发现，与我们调查的经济学专家的预测相反，在引发“黑人的命也是命”起义的事件发生后的三周内，警务公司的股价相对于类似行业中非警务公司的股价上涨了七个百分点。特别是，生产监控技术和警察问责工具的公司，在与“黑人的命也是命”行动相关的事件后获得了更高的回报。此外，在乔治·弗洛伊德被杀后，警务公司的基本面（如销售额）有所改善，这表明在引发“黑人的命也是命”起义的事件之后，投资者对警务公司未来表现的积极预期得到了证实。我们的研究展示了，尽管“黑人的命也是命”呼吁减少对警务的投资并探索替代性的公共安全方法，但金融市场如何将对黑人平民的高调暴力事件和系统性变革的呼声转化为股东收益和警察供应商的额外收入。
31606.meta: Programs：CF, LE, POL；JEL：D73, G14, G3, K42

31605.title: Incorporating Micro Data into Differentiated Products Demand Estimation with PyBLP
31605.zh_title: 使用PyBLP将微观数据纳入差异化产品需求估计
31605.abstract: We delineate a general framework for incorporating many types of micro data from summary statistics to full surveys of selected consumers into Berry, Levinsohn, and Pakes (1995)-style estimates of differentiated products demand systems. We extend recommended practices for BLP estimation in Conlon and Gortmaker (2020) to the case with micro data and implement them in our open-source package PyBLP. Monte Carlo experiments and empirical examples suggest that incorporating micro data can substantially improve the finite sample performance of the BLP estimator, particularly when using well-targeted summary statistics or “optimal micro moments” that we derive and show how to compute.
31605.zh_abstract: 我们描绘了一个通用框架，用于将多种类型的微观数据（从汇总统计到选定消费者的完整调查）纳入Berry、Levinsohn和Pakes（1995）风格的差异化产品需求系统估计中。我们将Conlon和Gortmaker（2020）中针对BLP估计的推荐实践扩展到包含微观数据的情况，并在我们的开源软件包PyBLP中实现它们。蒙特卡洛实验和实证例子表明，纳入微观数据可以显著改善BLP估计量的有限样本表现，特别是在使用针对性强的汇总统计或我们推导并展示如何计算的“最优微观矩”时。
31605.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：C13, C18, C30, D12, L0, L66

31604.title: Who (Actually) Gets the Farm? Intergenerational Farm Succession in the United States
31604.zh_title: 谁（实际上）继承了农场？美国的代际农场继承
31604.authors: Adrian Haws, David R. Just, Joseph Price
31604.abstract: Farm succession is a central issue in agricultural policy. Yet while many studies explore succession planning, little is known about how farms are actually transferred. We provide the first population-level evidence on intergenerational farm succession by linking US census records for millions of farmers’ children in 1900 and 1910 to identify which children own and operate the family farm up to 40 years later. We first show that daughters are rarely successors. Using a within-family identification strategy, we find that first-born sons are slightly more likely than their younger brothers to be successors while their parents are working aged. However, birth order is not predictive of who receives the farm when parents are older or deceased. For later farm transfers, sons who were previously tenant farmers are much more likely than their brothers to be successors, possibly because they are better prepared. Fewer than one-fifth of farmers transfer their farm to any son. Our study relies on rich historical data because current policy prevents the necessary data linkages for studying intergenerational farm succession. Providing a secure system for researchers to link modern agricultural data to population microdata, similar to what has been achieved with other data sources, would yield crucial insights into long-term agricultural policy issues in the US.
31604.zh_abstract: 农场继承是农业政策的核心问题。然而，尽管许多研究探讨了继承规划，但关于农场实际如何转移的知之甚少。我们通过关联1900年和1910年数百万农民子女的美国人口普查记录，首次提供了关于代际农场继承的人口层面证据，以确定哪些子女在长达40年后拥有并经营家庭农场。我们首先表明，女儿很少成为继承人。使用家庭内部识别策略，我们发现，在父母仍在工作年龄时，长子比其弟弟更有可能成为继承人。然而，当父母年长或去世时，出生顺序并不能预测谁将获得农场。对于后来的农场转移，以前是佃农的儿子比其兄弟更有可能成为继承人，这可能是因为他们准备更充分。不到五分之一的农民将农场转移给任何儿子。我们的研究依赖于丰富的历史数据，因为当前的政策阻止了研究代际农场继承所需的数据链接。建立一个安全系统，使研究人员能够将现代农业数据与人口微观数据联系起来，类似于其他数据源已经实现的那样，将为美国长期农业政策问题提供关键见解。
31604.meta: Programs：DEV；JEL：D64, J24, N32, N52, Q12, Q15

31603.title: The Macroeconomic Effects of the Federal Reserve's Conventional and Unconventional Monetary Policies
31603.zh_title: 美联储常规与非常规货币政策的宏观经济效应
31603.abstract: I separately identify and estimate the effects of the Federal Reserve’s federal funds rate, forward guidance, and large-scale asset purchase (LSAP) policies on the U.S. economy. I extend the high-frequency identification strategy of Bauer and Swanson (2023b) for monetary policy VARs by allowing each of the above policies to have possibly different economic effects. I follow Swanson (2021) and Swanson and Jayawickrema (2023) to separately identify federal funds rate, forward guidance, and LSAP components of monetary policy announcements using high-frequency interest rate changes around FOMC announcements, post- FOMC press conferences, FOMC meeting minutes releases, and speeches and testimony by the Fed Chair and Vice Chair. I find that changes in the federal funds rate have had the most powerful effects on the U.S. economy, followed by forward guidance and, lastly, LSAPs.
31603.zh_abstract: 我分别识别并估计了美联储的联邦基金利率、前瞻指引和大规模资产购买政策对美国经济的影响。我扩展了Bauer和Swanson（2023b）针对货币政策VAR的高频识别策略，允许上述每种政策可能产生不同的经济效应。我遵循Swanson（2021）以及Swanson和Jayawickrema（2023）的方法，利用联邦公开市场委员会公告前后、联邦公开市场委员会会后新闻发布会、联邦公开市场委员会会议纪要发布以及美联储主席和副主席的演讲和证词中的高频利率变化，分别识别联邦基金利率、前瞻指引和大规模资产购买政策公告的组成部分。我发现，联邦基金利率的变化对美国经济的影响最为强大，其次是前瞻指引，最后是大规模资产购买。

31602.title: Supply Chain Adjustments to Tariff Shocks: Evidence from Firm Trade Linkages in the 2018-2019 U.S. Trade War
31602.zh_title: 供应链对关税冲击的调整：来自2018-2019年美国贸易战中企业贸易联系的证据
31602.authors: Kyle Handley, Fariha Kamal, Ryan Monarch
31602.abstract: We use the 2018-2019 U.S. trade war to examine how supply chains adjustments to a tariff cost shock affect imports and exports. Using confidential firm-trade linked data, we show that the decline in imports of tariffed goods was driven by discontinuations of U.S. buyer–foreign supplier relationships, reduced formation of new relationships, and exits by U.S. firms from import markets altogether. However, tariffed products where imports were concentrated in fewer suppliers had a smaller decline in import growth. We then construct measures of export exposure to import tariffs by linking tariffs paid by importing firms to their exported products. We find that the most exposed products had lower exports in 2018-2019, with most of the impact occurring in 2019.
31602.zh_abstract: 我们利用2018-2019年的美国贸易战，研究供应链对关税成本冲击的调整如何影响进口和出口。使用保密的企贸关联数据，我们表明，受关税影响商品的进口下降是由美国买方-外国供应商关系的终止、新关系形成的减少以及美国企业完全退出进口市场所驱动的。然而，在进口集中在较少供应商的受关税影响产品中，进口增长的下降幅度较小。然后，我们通过将进口企业支付的关税与其出口产品联系起来，构建了出口对进口关税的暴露度指标。我们发现，暴露度最高的产品在2018-2019年的出口较低，其中大部分影响发生在2019年。

31601.title: Automatic Enrollment with a 12% Default Contribution Rate
31601.zh_title: 12%默认缴存率的自动加入计划
31601.authors: John Beshears, Ruofei Guo, David Laibson, Brigitte C. Madrian, James J. Choi
31601.abstract: We study a retirement savings plan with a default contribution rate of 12% of income, which is much higher than previously studied defaults. Twenty-five percent of employees had not opted out of this default 12 months after hire; a literature review finds that the corresponding fraction in plans with lower defaults is approximately one-half. Because only contributions above 12% were matched by the employer, 12% was likely to be a suboptimal contribution rate for employees. Employees who remained at the 12% default contribution rate had average income that was approximately one-third lower than would be predicted from the relationship between salaries and contribution rates among employees who were not at 12%. Defaults may influence low-income employees more strongly in part because these employees face higher psychological barriers to active decision making.
31601.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一项退休储蓄计划，其默认缴存率为收入的12%，远高于以往研究的默认水平。在入职12个月后，25%的员工未退出这一默认缴存率；文献综述发现，在默认缴存率较低的计划中，相应比例约为二分之一。由于只有超过12%的缴存部分才获得雇主匹配，12%对员工而言很可能是一个次优的缴存率。停留在12%默认缴存率的员工，其平均收入比根据非12%缴存率员工的薪资与缴存率关系所预测的水平低约三分之一。默认选项可能对低收入员工影响更强，部分原因是这些员工在主动决策时面临更高的心理障碍。
31601.meta: Programs：AG, PE；JEL：D14, D15, G40, G51, J32

31600.title: An Import(ant) Price of Brexit Uncertainty
31600.zh_title: 英国脱欧不确定性的一个重要价格
31600.authors: Alejandro G. Graziano, Kyle Handley, Nuno Limão
31600.abstract: We estimate the impact of trade policy uncertainty (TPU) on CES import price indices, focusing on the implications of Britain’s exit from the European Union (Brexit). Our analysis reveals that an increase in the probability of Brexit increases U.K. import price indices by raising the prices of existing products and by reducing product variety from the E.U. We find evidence that the risk of higher import protection from the 2016 referendum increased current import price indices by more than 10%. This amounted to a 2 log point increase in manufactured goods prices and a 0.6 log point decrease in consumers’ real income.
31600.zh_abstract: 我们估算了贸易政策不确定性对CES进口价格指数的影响，重点关注英国退出欧盟的影响。我们的分析表明，英国脱欧概率的增加通过提高现有产品价格和减少来自欧盟的产品种类，推高了英国进口价格指数。我们发现，2016年公投带来的更高进口保护风险，使当前进口价格指数上升超过10%。这导致制成品价格上涨2个对数点，消费者实际收入下降0.6个对数点。
31600.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：D8, E02, F02, F13, F14, F15

31650.title: Game, Sweat, Match: Temperature and Elite Worker Productivity
31650.zh_title: 比赛、汗水、胜负：温度与精英劳动者生产率
31650.authors: Marshall Burke, Vincent Tanutama, Sam Heft-Neal, Miyuki Hino, David Lobell
31650.abstract: The effect of hot temperatures on labor productivity is thought to be a key channel through which a warming climate will impact the economy, and these impacts could help explain broader observed relationships between temperature and economic output. Yet for many workers and jobs, especially the high-wage service-economy work that constitutes a large share of total economic output in wealthy nations, productivity is hard to measure and thus climate impacts hard to quantify. We study a high-wage job where individual productivity is readily observable: professional tennis. Using 15 years of data on 177 thousand tennis matches merged to hourly temperature data, we study the effects of temperature on tennis performance in contemporaneous and future matches. Variation in player birthplace and residence allows us to study whether players adapt to heat, and data from betting markets allows us to evaluate whether markets price climate risk. We find that hot temperatures increase contemporaneous errors and retirements, and reduce win probability in the subsequent match. In percentage terms, estimated effects on earnings are smaller than lower-wage settings studied in existing literature. By most measures, top players are less affected by hot temperatures. Most tennis betting markets appear to accurately price climate risk, and temperature impacts do not appear to offer profitable arbitrage opportunities.
31650.zh_abstract: 高温对劳动生产率的影响被认为是气候变暖影响经济的关键渠道，这些影响可能有助于解释观测到的温度与经济产出之间的广泛关系。然而，对于许多劳动者和工作岗位，尤其是构成富裕国家经济产出主要部分的高薪服务业工作，生产率难以衡量，因此气候影响也难以量化。我们研究了一个个人生产率易于观察的高薪职业：职业网球。利用15年间17.7万场网球比赛的数据，并结合每小时温度数据，我们研究了温度对网球运动员当前及未来比赛表现的影响。运动员出生地和居住地的差异使我们能够研究运动员是否适应了高温，而博彩市场的数据则使我们能够评估市场是否对气候风险进行了定价。我们发现，高温会增加当前的失误和退赛次数，并降低下一场比赛的获胜概率。按百分比计算，对收入的影响小于现有文献中研究的低薪环境。从大多数指标来看，顶级运动员受高温影响较小。大多数网球博彩市场似乎能准确地对气候风险进行定价，温度影响似乎并未提供可获利的套利机会。

31649.title: The Child Penalty Atlas
31649.authors: Henrik Kleven, Camille Landais, Gabriel Leite-Mariante
31649.abstract: This paper builds a world atlas of child penalties in employment based on micro data from 134 countries. The estimation of child penalties is based on pseudo-event studies of first child birth using cross-sectional data. The pseudo-event studies are validated against true event studies using panel data for a subset of countries. Most countries display clear and sizable child penalties: men and women follow parallel trends before parenthood, but diverge sharply and persistently after parenthood. While this pattern is pervasive, there is enormous variation in the magnitude of the effects across different regions of the world. The fraction of gender inequality explained by child penalties varies systematically with economic development and proxies for structural transformation. At low levels of development, child penalties represent a minuscule fraction of gender inequality. But as economies develop — incomes rise and the labor market transitions from subsistence agriculture to salaried work in industry and services — child penalties take over as the dominant driver of gender inequality. The relationship between child penalties and development is validated using historical data from current high-income countries, back to the 1700s for some countries. Finally, because parenthood is often tied to marriage, we also investigate the existence of marriage penalties in female employment. In general, women experience both marriage and child penalties, but their relative importance depends on the level of development. The development process is associated with a substitution from marriage penalties to child penalties, with the former gradually converging to zero.
31649.zh_abstract: 本文基于134个国家的微观数据，构建了一个全球就业领域生育惩罚图谱。生育惩罚的估计基于使用横截面数据对首次生育进行的伪事件研究。这些伪事件研究通过与部分国家使用面板数据进行的真实事件研究进行对比验证。大多数国家都显示出明显且规模可观的生育惩罚：男性和女性在成为父母之前遵循平行趋势，但在成为父母之后出现急剧且持续的分化。虽然这种模式普遍存在，但世界不同地区的影响程度存在巨大差异。由生育惩罚解释的性别不平等比例随经济发展和结构转型的代理指标系统性地变化。在低发展水平下，生育惩罚仅占性别不平等的极小部分。但随着经济发展——收入增加，劳动力市场从自给农业转向工业和服务业的受薪工作——生育惩罚成为性别不平等的主要驱动因素。生育惩罚与发展之间的关系已使用当前高收入国家的历史数据（部分国家可追溯至18世纪）得到验证。最后，由于为人父母通常与婚姻相关联，我们还研究了女性就业中是否存在婚姻惩罚。总体而言，女性同时经历婚姻惩罚和生育惩罚，但它们的相对重要性取决于发展水平。发展过程伴随着从婚姻惩罚向生育惩罚的替代，前者逐渐趋近于零。
31649.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, LS, PE；JEL：D13, D30, J12, J13, J16, J21, J22, O12

31648.title: The Outlook for Long-Term Economic Growth
31648.abstract: What are the prospects for economic growth in the United States and other advanced countries over the next several decades? U.S. growth for the past 150 years has been surprisingly stable at 2% per year. Growth theory reveals that in the long run, growth in living standards is determined by growth in the worldwide number of people searching for ideas. At the same time, a growth accounting exercise for the United States since the 1950s suggests that many other factors have temporarily contributed to growth, including rising educational attainment and a rising investment rate in ideas. But these forces are inherently temporary, implying that growth rates could slow in the future. This prediction is reinforced by declining population growth throughout the world. In contrast, other forces could potentially sustain or even increase growth. The emergence of countries such as China and India provides large numbers of people who could search for ideas. Improvements in the allocation of talent --- for example, the rise of women inventors --- and increased automation through artificial intelligence are other potential tailwinds.
31648.zh_abstract: 未来几十年，美国及其他发达国家的经济增长前景如何？过去150年间，美国经济增长出奇地稳定在每年2%。增长理论揭示，从长期来看，生活水平的增长取决于全球范围内寻找创意的人口数量的增长。同时，自20世纪50年代以来对美国的增长核算表明，许多其他因素暂时促进了增长，包括教育程度的提高和创意投资率的上升。但这些力量本质上是暂时的，意味着未来增长率可能会放缓。这一预测因全球人口增长下降而得到加强。相比之下，其他力量可能维持甚至提高增长。中国和印度等国家的崛起提供了大量可能寻找创意的人口。人才配置的改善——例如女性发明家的增加——以及通过人工智能实现的自动化程度提高，是其他潜在的有利因素。

31647.title: Stress Testing Structural Models of Unobserved Heterogeneity: Robust Inference on Optimal Nonlinear Pricing
31647.zh_title: 对未观测异质性结构模型的压力测试：最优非线性定价的稳健推断
31647.authors: Aaron L. Bodoh-Creed, Brent R. Hickman, John A. List, Ian Muir, Gregory K. Sun
31647.abstract: We propose a suite of tools for empirical market design in adverse-selection settings where point identification based on exogenous price variation is hampered by multi-dimensional unobserved heterogeneity. Despite significant data limitations, we are able to derive informative bounds on counterfactual consumer demand under out-of-sample price changes. These bounds arise because empirically plausible DGPs must respect the Law of Demand and the observed shift(s) in aggregate demand resulting from a known exogenous price change(s). The bounds facilitate robust policy prescriptions using rich, internal data sources similar to those available in many real- world settings, including our empirical application to rideshare demand. Our partial identification approach enables viable, welfare-improving, nonlinear pricing design while achieving robustness against worst-case deviations from baseline model assumptions. As a side benefit, our framework also provides novel insights into optimal experimental design for pricing RCTs.
31647.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一套工具，用于在逆向选择环境下进行实证市场设计，在这种环境下，基于外生价格变动的点识别受到多维未观测异质性的阻碍。尽管存在显著的数据限制，我们仍能推导出在样本外价格变化下反事实消费者需求的信息性边界。这些边界之所以存在，是因为经验上合理的数据生成过程必须尊重需求定律以及由已知外生价格变化引起的观测到的总需求变化。这些边界有助于利用丰富的内部数据源（类似于许多现实世界环境中可用的数据，包括我们应用于网约车需求的实证案例）制定稳健的政策建议。我们的部分识别方法能够实现可行且福利改善的非线性定价设计，同时确保对基线模型假设的最坏情况偏离具有稳健性。作为附带好处，我们的框架还为定价随机对照试验的最优实验设计提供了新颖见解。
31647.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：B4, C14, C51, C52, C93, D04, J02, L1, L5

31646.title: Regulatory Arbitrage or Random Errors? Implications of Race Prediction Algorithms in Fair Lending Analysis
31646.zh_title: 监管套利还是随机误差？公平贷款分析中种族预测算法的含义
31646.authors: Daniel Greenwald, Sabrina T. Howell, Cangyuan Li, Emmanuel Yimfor
31646.abstract: When race is not directly observed, regulators and analysts commonly predict it using algorithms based on last name and address. In small business lending—where regulators assess fair lending law compliance using the Bayesian Improved Surname Geocoding (BISG) algorithm—we document large prediction errors among Black Americans. The errors bias measured racial disparities in loan approval rates downward by 43%, with greater bias for traditional vs. fintech lenders. Regulation using self-identified race would increase lending to Black borrowers, but also shift lending toward affluent areas because errors correlate with socioeconomics. Overall, using race proxies in policymaking and research presents challenges.
31646.zh_abstract: 当种族未被直接观测到时，监管者和分析师通常使用基于姓氏和地址的算法来预测种族。在小型企业贷款中——监管机构使用贝叶斯改进姓氏地理编码算法评估公平贷款法合规性——我们记录了美国黑人群体中存在巨大的预测误差。这些误差使贷款批准率中观测到的种族差异向下偏误了43%，对传统贷款机构而言偏误大于金融科技贷款机构。使用自我认定的种族进行监管将增加对黑人借款人的贷款，但由于误差与社会经济状况相关，也会将贷款转向富裕地区。总体而言，在政策制定和研究中使用种族代理变量带来了挑战。
31646.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：C81, G21, G23, G28, J15

31645.title: Committing to Grow: Privatizations and Firm Dynamics in East Germany
31645.zh_title: 承诺增长：东德私有化与企业动态
31645.authors: Ufuk Akcigit, Harun Alp, André Diegmann, Nicolas Serrano-Velarde
31645.abstract: This paper investigates a unique policy designed to maintain employment during the privatization of East German firms after the fall of the Iron Curtain. The policy required new owners of the firms to commit to employment targets, with penalties for non-compliance. Using a dynamic model, we highlight three channels through which employment targets impact firms: distorted employment decisions, increased productivity, and higher exit rates. Our empirical analysis, using a novel dataset and instrumental variable approach, confirms these findings. We estimate a 22% points higher annual employment growth rate, a 14% points higher annual productivity growth, and a 3.6% points higher probability of exit for firms with binding employment targets. Our calibrated model further demonstrates that without these targets, aggregate employment would have been 15% lower after 10 years. Additionally, an alternative policy of productivity investment subsidies proved costly and less effective in the short term.
31645.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一项旨在铁幕倒塌后东德企业私有化过程中维持就业的独特政策。该政策要求企业新所有者承诺就业目标，并对不遵守规定进行处罚。通过使用动态模型，我们强调了就业目标影响企业的三个渠道：扭曲的就业决策、生产率提高以及更高的退出率。我们的实证分析使用了一个新颖的数据集和工具变量方法，证实了这些发现。我们估计，对于有约束性就业目标的企业，年就业增长率高出22个百分点，年生产率增长率高出14个百分点，退出概率高出3.6个百分点。我们校准的模型进一步表明，如果没有这些目标，10年后的总就业人数将减少15%。此外，另一种替代政策——生产率投资补贴——成本高昂且在短期内效果较差。

31644.title: Keep Calm and Bank On: Panic-Driven Bank Runs and the Role of Public Communication
31644.zh_title: 保持冷静，继续存款：恐慌驱动的银行挤兑与公共沟通的作用
31644.authors: Damiano Sandri, Francesco Grigoli, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Olivier Coibion
31644.abstract: Using a survey with information treatments conducted in the aftermath of SVB’s collapse, we study households’ perspectives on bank stability, the potential for panic-driven bank runs, and the role of public communication. When informed about SVB’s collapse, households become more likely to withdraw deposits, due to both a higher perceived risk of bank failure and higher expected losses on deposits in case of bank failure. Leveraging hypothetical questions and the exogenous variation in beliefs generated by the information treatments, we show that households reallocate deposit withdrawals primarily into other banks and cash, with little passthrough into spending. Information about FDIC insurance and communication about bank stability by the Federal Reserve can reassure depositors, while communication from political leaders only influences their electoral base.
31644.zh_abstract: 利用在硅谷银行倒闭后进行的带有信息干预的问卷调查，我们研究了家庭对银行稳定性的看法、恐慌驱动银行挤兑的可能性以及公共沟通的作用。当被告知硅谷银行倒闭时，家庭更有可能提取存款，这既是因为感知到的银行倒闭风险更高，也是因为预期银行倒闭时存款损失更大。借助假设性问题以及信息干预产生的信念外生变化，我们表明家庭将提取的存款主要重新配置到其他银行和现金中，很少传导至支出。关于联邦存款保险公司保险的信息以及美联储关于银行稳定性的沟通可以安抚储户，而政治领导人的沟通仅影响其选举基础。

31643.title: Encouraging Preventative Care to Manage Chronic Disease at Scale
31643.zh_title: 大规模鼓励预防性护理以管理慢性病
31643.authors: Claire E. Boone, Pablo A. Celhay, Paul Gertler, Tadeja Gracner
31643.abstract: We study how reminding high-risk patients with chronic disease of their upcoming primary care appointments impacts their health care and behaviors. We leverage a natural experiment in Chile’s public healthcare system that sent reminders before preventative care appointments to over 300,000 patients with type 2 diabetes and hypertension across 315 public primary care clinics between 2013 and 2018. Employing both a difference-in-differences and instrumental variables approach on national administrative patient-level data, we show that reminders increased preventative care visits, which led to more health screenings and improved medication adherence. In this at-scale program, we find substantial variation in implementation fidelity across clinics, which, once accounted for increases our estimates by over a third. Reminders also increased hospitalizations and reduced in-hospital mortality, suggesting an improvement in timely care-seeking behavior among high-risk patients. Our findings inform healthcare settings where patients must first visit their primary care provider for approval before undergoing tests, receiving medication prescriptions, or getting referrals to other specialists. Through intervening at the first step in the cascade of care, we find that a simple intervention like reminders can have large and meaningful downstream effects.
31643.zh_abstract: 我们研究了提醒高风险慢性病患者即将到来的初级保健预约如何影响其医疗保健和行为。我们利用了智利公共医疗系统中的一个自然实验，该系统在2013年至2018年间向315家公共初级保健诊所的超过30万名2型糖尿病和高血压患者发送了预防性护理预约提醒。采用双重差分法和工具变量法，基于全国行政层面的患者数据，我们表明提醒增加了预防性护理就诊，这导致了更多的健康筛查和改善的药物依从性。在这个大规模项目中，我们发现各诊所的实施保真度存在显著差异，一旦考虑这一因素，我们的估计值提高了三分之一以上。提醒还增加了住院率并降低了院内死亡率，这表明高风险患者寻求及时护理的行为有所改善。我们的发现为那些患者必须首先就诊初级保健提供者以获得检查、药物处方或转诊至其他专科医生批准的医疗环境提供了信息。通过在护理级联的第一步进行干预，我们发现像提醒这样简单的干预措施可以产生巨大且有意义的后续影响。
31643.meta: Programs：AG, DEV, EH, PE；JEL：I11, I12, I15

31642.title: The Fast, the Slow, and the Congested: Urban Transportation in Rich and Poor Countries
31642.zh_title: 快、慢与拥堵：富裕与贫穷国家的城市交通
31642.authors: Prottoy A. Akbar, Victor Couture, Gilles Duranton, Adam Storeygard
31642.abstract: We assemble a new global database on motor vehicle travel speed in over 1,200 large cities in 152 countries. We then estimate comparable city-level indices of travel speed and congestion. Most of the variation in urban travel speed is across countries, not within. National income per capita explains most of this cross-country variation in speed. In rich countries, urban travel is roughly 50% faster than in poor countries. To investigate the link between economic development and mobility, we develop an urban model with endogenous travel, road infrastructure, and land area. The model provides an exact decomposition of how city size, infrastructure, and topography contribute to explaining why urban travel is faster in richer countries. We find that richer countries are faster, mainly because their cities have more major roads and wider land areas. These effects operate by increasing uncongested speed, not by reducing congestion.
31642.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个新的全球数据库，涵盖152个国家超过1200个大城市的机动车行驶速度。随后，我们估算了可比较的城市层面的行驶速度与拥堵指数。城市行驶速度的差异主要存在于国家之间，而非国家内部。人均国民收入解释了这种跨国速度差异的大部分原因。在富裕国家，城市出行速度比贫穷国家大约快50%。为了探究经济发展与出行能力之间的联系，我们构建了一个包含内生出行、道路基础设施和土地面积的城市模型。该模型精确分解了城市规模、基础设施和地形如何共同解释为何富裕国家的城市出行更快。我们发现，富裕国家出行更快，主要是因为其城市拥有更多主干道和更广阔的土地面积。这些效应通过提高无拥堵速度来实现，而非通过减少拥堵。

31641.title: The Limits of Educational Attainment in Mitigating Occupational Segregation Between Black and White Workers
31641.zh_title: 教育程度在缓解黑人与白人工人职业隔离中的局限性
31641.authors: Ashley Jardina, Peter Q. Blair, Justin Heck, Papia Debroy
31641.abstract: Past work has documented significant occupational segregation between Black and white workers in the U.S. labor force. Little work, however, has examined racial occupational segregation in recent years or by levels of education and then at the intersection of education and race. In this paper, we contribute to this literature by calculating a dissimilarity index to examine racial occupational segregation between 1980 and 2019, comparing Black and white workers with and without bachelor’s degrees and by developing a Monte Carlo simulation, where we compare the observed levels of segregation to predicted levels of racial occupational segregation by education under race-neutral conditions. First, we find that considerable racial occupation segregation in the labor market persists today regardless of educational attainment and that observed segregation is substantially higher than would be expected at random, conditional on educational attainment, gender, and geography. We compare the types of occupations in which Black and white workers are disproportionately situated, and we show that this segregation has significant consequences for wage inequality between Black and white workers with and without four-year degrees. Overall, our results show that racial occupational desegregation has stalled in the past two decades despite rising educational attainment amongst Black workers.
31641.zh_abstract: 以往的研究记录了美国劳动力市场中黑人与白人工人之间存在显著的职业隔离。然而，很少有研究考察近年来的种族职业隔离，或按教育水平以及教育与种族的交叉点进行分析。在本文中，我们通过计算相异指数来考察1980年至2019年间的种族职业隔离，比较拥有和未拥有学士学位的黑人与白人工人，并开发了一个蒙特卡洛模拟，将观察到的隔离水平与种族中立条件下按教育程度预测的种族职业隔离水平进行比较。首先，我们发现，无论教育程度如何，劳动力市场中显著的种族职业隔离至今仍然存在，并且观察到的隔离程度远高于在给定教育程度、性别和地理位置条件下的随机预期。我们比较了黑人和白人工人不成比例地集中的职业类型，并表明这种隔离对拥有和未拥有四年制学位的黑人与白人工人之间的工资不平等具有显著影响。总体而言，我们的结果表明，尽管黑人工人的教育程度不断提高，但种族职业隔离在过去二十年中已陷入停滞。

31640.title: Target Date Funds as Asset Market Stabilizers: Evidence from the Pandemic
31640.zh_title: 作为资产市场稳定器的目标日期基金：来自新冠疫情的证据
31640.abstract: Target Date Funds (TDFs) provide retirement investors, many of whom are unsophisticated or inattentive, with age-appropriate exposures to different asset classes like stocks and bonds. To maintain exposures, TDFs trade actively against market returns, buying stock funds when the stock market does poorly, and selling when the market does well (Parker, Schoar, and Sun, 2023). This paper shows that trading by TDFs was a significant stabilizing force in US equity markets during the unprecedented economic volatility of the COVID-19 pandemic period. Specifically, TDFs – now comprising a quarter of all 401(k) plan assets – caused significant contrarian investment flows across asset classes, flows that were not undone by enrollment of TDF investors or by discretionary actions by TDF managers. Mutual funds with large ownership by TDFs had more stable funding through the pandemic, and stocks that had greater indirect ownership by TDFs had lower co-movement with the market and lower volatility during the pandemic period.
31640.zh_abstract: 目标日期基金（TDFs）为退休投资者（其中许多是不成熟或注意力不集中的投资者）提供与年龄相适应的不同资产类别（如股票和债券）的风险敞口。为了维持风险敞口，TDFs会针对市场回报进行积极交易：当股市表现不佳时买入股票基金，当市场表现良好时卖出（Parker, Schoar, and Sun, 2023）。本文表明，在COVID-19疫情期间前所未有的经济波动中，TDFs的交易是美国股票市场一个重要的稳定力量。具体来说，TDFs（目前占所有401(k)计划资产的四分之一）导致了跨资产类别的显著逆势投资流，这些资金流并未因TDF投资者的注册或TDF管理者的自由裁量行为而逆转。TDFs持有大量所有权的共同基金在疫情期间拥有更稳定的资金来源，而TDFs间接持有更多所有权的股票在疫情期间与市场的联动性更低，波动性也更低。
31640.meta: Programs：AG, AP, EFG；JEL：G12, G23, G51, H55

31639.title: Insuring those Who Bear the Risk: The Impact of Gender-inclusive Insurance in Kenya
31639.zh_title: 为承担风险者提供保险：肯尼亚性别包容性保险的影响
31639.authors: Julian Arteaga, Michael Carter, Andrew Hobbs
31639.abstract: The novel insurance contracts for crop losses and livestock mortality that have been developed in low income countries typically protect against shocks in the traditionally male sphere of economic activity. Often overlooked are women, the particularities of their indirect exposure to this risk, and their socially constructed responsibility to manage family well-being. To fill this lacuna, this paper studies the effect of a low-cost intervention that reformulates a livestock insurance contract so that it directly addresses women’s risk and is sold in units that are commensurate with women’s expenditure responsibilities. We measure the effect of this contractual reformulation using a randomized trial amongst pastoralist communities in Kenya. Twenty-nine percent of previously subsidized households that received the novel contractual formulation purchased insurance (without subsidy), compared to only nineteen percent of previously subsidized households offered insurance under the standard malerisk formulation. Households that had not received prior insurance subsidies purchased no insurance, irrespective of the inclusivity of the insurance design. Protecting women, their assets, and those who depend on them will require a combination of smart subsidies and gender-inclusive insurance contract design.
31639.zh_abstract: 在低收入国家开发的针对作物损失和牲畜死亡的新型保险合同，通常保护的是传统上属于男性经济活动领域的冲击。女性、她们对此类风险的间接暴露的特殊性，以及她们在社会建构下管理家庭福祉的责任，往往被忽视。为填补这一空白，本文研究了一项低成本干预措施的效果，该措施重新设计了牲畜保险合同，使其直接应对女性的风险，并以与女性支出责任相称的单位进行销售。我们通过在肯尼亚牧民社区进行的一项随机试验来衡量这种合同重新设计的效果。在之前获得补贴的家庭中，收到新型合同设计的家庭中有29%购买了保险（无补贴），而相比之下，在标准男性风险合同设计下获得保险的家庭中，这一比例仅为19%。之前未获得保险补贴的家庭无论保险设计是否具有包容性，都没有购买任何保险。保护女性、她们的资产以及依赖她们的人，将需要结合明智的补贴和性别包容性的保险合同设计。

31638.title: The Value of Communication for Mental Health
31638.zh_title: 沟通对心理健康的价值
31638.abstract: Mental health disorders account for a significant share of the overall global disease burden. The economic losses from such disorders are staggeringly large, particularly in low-income countries, where people are faced with several unexpected shocks. We test whether improved communication can mitigate such mental health disorders. Partnering with a major telecommunications company, we implement low-cost communication interventions that provide mobile calling credits to a nationally representative set of low-income adults in Ghana during the COVID-19 pandemic. Individuals’ inability to make unexpected calls, need to borrow SOS airtime, and to seek digital loans decreased significantly relative to a control group. As a result, the programs led to a significant decrease in mental distress (-9.8%), the likelihood of severe mental distress by -2.3 percentage points (a quarter of the mean prevalence), and domestic violence, with null impact on consumption expenditure. The effects are stronger for monthly mobile credits than a lump-sum. We present evidence that improvements in both business-related services and social inclusion and/or protection are relevant explanations. Simple cost-benefit analysis shows that providing communication credit to low-income adults is a cost-effective policy for improving mental health. Communication – the ability to stay connected – meaningfully improves mental well-being and interventions about communication are particularly valuable when implemented as many installments.
31638.zh_abstract: 心理健康障碍在全球疾病总负担中占很大比例。此类障碍造成的经济损失巨大，尤其是在低收入国家，那里的人们面临着若干意外冲击。我们检验了改善沟通是否可以减轻此类心理健康障碍。我们与一家大型电信公司合作，在COVID-19疫情期间，向加纳具有全国代表性的低收入成年人群体实施了低成本的沟通干预措施，即提供移动通话积分。与对照组相比，干预组个体无法进行意外通话、需要借用SOS通话时间以及寻求数字贷款的情况显著减少。因此，这些项目导致心理困扰显著降低（-9.8%），严重心理困扰的可能性降低了2.3个百分点（占平均患病率的四分之一），并减少了家庭暴力，而对消费支出没有影响。按月发放移动积分的效果比一次性发放更强。我们提供的证据表明，商业相关服务以及社会包容和/或保护的改善是相关的解释。简单的成本效益分析表明，向低收入成年人提供沟通积分是改善心理健康的一项具有成本效益的政策。沟通——保持联系的能力——能显著改善心理健康，而关于沟通的干预措施在分期实施时尤其有价值。
31638.meta: Programs：DEV, EH；JEL：I12, I15, I38, L63, O12

31637.title: Prison Labor: The Price of Prisons and the Lasting Effects of Incarceration
31637.zh_title: 监狱劳动：监狱的代价与监禁的持久影响
31637.abstract: Institutions of justice, like prisons, can be used to serve economic and other extrajudicial interests, with lasting deleterious effects. We study the effects on incarceration when prisoners are primarily used as a source of labor using evidence from British colonial Nigeria. We digitized 65 years of archival records on prisons from 1920 to 1995 and provide new estimates on the value of colonial prison labor and the effects of labor demand shocks on incarceration. We find that prison labor was economically valuable to the colonial regime, making up a significant share of colonial public works expenditure. Positive economic shocks increased incarceration rates over the colonial period. This result is reversed in the postcolonial period, where prison labor is not a notable feature of state public finance. We document a significant reduction in present-day trust in legal institutions, such as the police, in areas with high historical exposure to colonial imprisonment; the resulting reduction in trust is specific to legal institutions.
31637.zh_abstract: 司法机构，如监狱，可以被用来服务于经济和其他法外利益，并产生持久的破坏性影响。我们利用英属殖民时期尼日利亚的证据，研究了当囚犯主要被用作劳动力来源时对监禁的影响。我们将1920年至1995年间65年的监狱档案记录数字化，并对殖民时期监狱劳动的价值以及劳动力需求冲击对监禁的影响提供了新的估计。我们发现，监狱劳动对殖民政权具有经济价值，占殖民公共工程支出的很大一部分。正向经济冲击在殖民时期增加了监禁率。这一结果在后殖民时期发生了逆转，在后殖民时期，监狱劳动不再是国家公共财政的一个显著特征。我们记录到，在历史上受殖民监禁影响较大的地区，当今对法律机构（如警察）的信任度显著降低；这种信任度的降低是专门针对法律机构的。
31637.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, POL；JEL：H5, J47, N37, O10, O43

31636.title: Voting Choice
31636.abstract: Traditionally, fund managers cast votes on behalf of investors whose capital they manage. Recently, this system has come under intense debate given the growing concentration of voting power among a few asset managers and disagreements over environmental and social issues. Major fund managers now offer their investors a choice: delegate their votes to the fund or cast votes themselves ("voting choice"). This paper develops a theory of delegation of voting rights and studies the implications of voting choice for investor welfare. If the reason for offering voting choice is that investors have different preferences, then investors may retain their voting rights excessively, inefficiently prioritizing their private preferences over information. As a result, investors on aggregate are not always better off if voting choice is offered to them. In contrast, if the reason for offering voting choice is that investors have information about the proposal that the fund manager does not have, then voting choice is generally efficient, increasing investor welfare. However, if information collection is costly, voting choice may lead to coordination failure, resulting in less informed voting outcomes.
31636.zh_abstract: 传统上，基金经理代表其管理的资本的投资者进行投票。近年来，鉴于投票权在少数资产管理公司中日益集中，以及在环境和社会问题上的分歧，这一体系引发了激烈辩论。大型基金管理公司现在为其投资者提供选择：将投票权委托给基金，或者自己投票（“投票选择”）。本文发展了一个投票权委托理论，并研究了投票选择对投资者福利的影响。如果提供投票选择的原因是投资者有不同的偏好，那么投资者可能会过度保留其投票权，低效地将其私人偏好置于信息之上。因此，从总体上看，如果向投资者提供投票选择，他们的境况并不总是会变得更好。相反，如果提供投票选择的原因是投资者拥有基金经理所没有的关于提案的信息，那么投票选择通常是有效的，能够增加投资者福利。然而，如果信息收集是有成本的，投票选择可能导致协调失败，从而产生信息含量更低的投票结果。

31635.title: Judging Banks’ Risk by the Profits They Report
31635.zh_title: 通过报告利润判断银行风险
31635.authors: Ben S. Meiselman, Stefan Nagel, Amiyatosh Purnanandam
31635.abstract: In competitive capital markets, risky debt claims that offer high yields in good times have high systematic risk exposure in bad times. We apply this idea to bank risk measurement. We find that banks with high accounting return on equity (ROE) prior to a crisis have higher systematic tail risk exposure during the crisis. Proximate causes of crises differ, but the predictive power of ROE is pervasive, including during the financial crisis of 2007–2010 and the recent crisis triggered by the collapse of Silicon Valley Bank. ROE predicts systematic tail risk much better than conventional measures based on risk-weighted assets.
31635.zh_abstract: 在竞争性资本市场中，在经济景气时提供高收益的风险债务在景气不佳时具有高系统性风险暴露。我们将这一思想应用于银行风险度量。我们发现，在危机前拥有高会计股本回报率（ROE）的银行，在危机期间具有更高的系统性尾部风险暴露。危机的直接原因各不相同，但ROE的预测能力是普遍的，包括在2007-2010年金融危机以及最近由硅谷银行倒闭引发的危机期间。ROE对系统性尾部风险的预测能力远优于基于风险加权资产的传统度量方法。

31634.title: The Effect of Immigration Policy on Founding Location Choice: Evidence from Canada's Start-up Visa Program
31634.zh_title: 移民政策对创业地点选择的影响：来自加拿大创业签证计划的证据
31634.abstract: To spur entrepreneurship and economic growth, an increasing number of countries have introduced immigration policies that provide visas to skilled entrepreneurs. This paper investigates whether these policies influence the founding location choice of immigrant founders, by leveraging the introduction of Canada's Start-up Visa Program in 2013. We demonstrate that this immigration policy increased the likelihood that U.S.-based immigrants have a start-up in Canada by 69%. Our results show that Asian immigrants (who have a higher representation in Canada than in the U.S.) are disproportionately more likely to migrate to Canada to start their businesses, whereas Hispanic immigrants (who have a smaller representation in Canada than in the U.S.) are less inclined to do so. We also find that this propensity varies with the size of co-ethnic immigrant communities in the origin location. Overall, our study unveils the importance of immigration policies in determining founding location choice and has important implications for countries competing for global talent.
31634.zh_abstract: 为了促进创业和经济增长，越来越多的国家推出了向技术型创业者提供签证的移民政策。本文利用加拿大2013年推出的创业签证计划，研究这些政策是否影响移民创始人的创业地点选择。我们证明，这项移民政策使美国移民在加拿大创办初创企业的可能性增加了69%。我们的结果显示，亚裔移民（在加拿大的代表性高于美国）更倾向于迁移到加拿大创业，而西班牙裔移民（在加拿大的代表性低于美国）则不太愿意这样做。我们还发现，这种倾向随原居住地同族移民社区的规模而变化。总体而言，我们的研究揭示了移民政策在决定创业地点选择中的重要性，并对争夺全球人才的国家具有重要启示。

31633.title: Corporate Social Responsibility and Voting over Public Goods
31633.zh_title: 企业社会责任与公共品投票
31633.abstract: This paper analyzes the impact of corporate social responsibility (CSR) on the total provision of public goods in a framework in which consumers who may make such voluntary contributions to public goods via CSR are also voters who decide on the level of taxes to finance publicly provided public goods. The main result indicates that, relative to an economy in which all public goods are publicly financed, the introduction of CSR lowers the total amount of public goods, as voters rationally anticipate that higher CSR will partially offset the consequences of lower public funding. The results offer a cautionary tale about the promotion of CSR in an economy with heterogeneous preferences for the public good.
31633.zh_abstract: 本文在一个框架中分析了企业社会责任对公共品总供给的影响，该框架中，可能通过企业社会责任自愿为公共品做出贡献的消费者，同时也是决定税收水平以资助公共提供的公共品的选民。主要结果表明，与所有公共品均由公共资助的经济体相比，企业社会责任的引入降低了公共品总量，因为选民理性地预期更高的企业社会责任将部分抵消公共资金减少的后果。这些结果对在公共品偏好异质性的经济体中推广企业社会责任提出了警示。

31632.title: Hidden Figures: Uncovering Quantities Behind Zeros with Econometrics
31632.zh_title: 隐藏的数字：用计量经济学揭示零背后的数量
31632.abstract: This chapter reviews the econometric approaches typically used to deal with the spike of zeros when modeling non-negative outcomes such as expenditures, income, or consumption.
31632.zh_abstract: 本章回顾了在建模非负结果（如支出、收入或消费）时，通常用于处理零值堆积的计量经济学方法。

31631.title: How People Use Statistics
31631.authors: Pedro Bordalo, John J. Conlon, Nicola Gennaioli, Spencer Yongwook Kwon, Andrei Shleifer
31631.abstract: We document two new facts about the distributions of answers in famous statistical problems: they are i) multi-modal and ii) unstable with respect to irrelevant changes in the problem. We offer a model in which, when solving a problem, people represent each hypothesis by attending “bottom up” to its salient features while neglecting other, potentially more relevant, ones. Only the statistics associated with salient features are used, others are neglected. The model unifies biases in judgments about i.i.d. draws, such as the Gambler’s Fallacy and insensitivity to sample size, with biases in inference such as under- and overreaction and insensitivity to the weight of evidence. The model makes predictions about how changes in the salience of specific features should jointly shape the prevalence of these biases and measured attention to features, but also create entirely new biases. We test and confirm these predictions experimentally. Bottom-up attention to features emerges as a unifying framework for biases conventionally explained using a variety of stable heuristics or distortions of the Bayes rule.
31631.zh_abstract: 我们记录了著名统计问题中答案分布的两个新事实：它们是(i)多峰的，并且(ii)对问题中无关的变化不稳定。我们提出了一个模型，在该模型中，当解决问题时，人们通过“自下而上”地关注每个假设的显著特征，同时忽略其他可能更相关的特征来表征每个假设。只有与显著特征相关的统计信息被使用，其他则被忽略。该模型统一了关于独立同分布抽样的判断偏差（如赌徒谬误和对样本大小的不敏感）与推理偏差（如反应不足和过度反应以及对证据权重的不敏感）。该模型预测了特定特征显著性的变化应如何共同塑造这些偏差的普遍性和对特征的测量注意力，同时也会产生全新的偏差。我们通过实验测试并证实了这些预测。对特征的“自下而上”注意力作为一个统一框架出现，用于解释通常使用各种稳定启发式或贝叶斯规则扭曲来解释的偏差。

31630.title: Show Me the Money! Incentives and Nudges to Shift Electric Vehicle Charge Timing
31630.zh_title: 给我钱！改变电动汽车充电时间的激励与助推
31630.authors: Megan R. Bailey, David P. Brown, Blake C. Shaffer, Frank A. Wolak
31630.abstract: We use a field experiment to measure the effectiveness of financial incentives and moral suasion “nudges” to shift the timing of electric vehicle (EV) charging. We find EV owners respond strongly to financial incentives, while nudges have no statistically discernible effect. When financial incentives are removed, charge timing reverts to pre-intervention behavior, showing no evidence of habit formation and reinforcing our finding that “money matters”. Our charge price responsiveness estimate is an order of magnitude larger than typical household electricity consumption elasticities. This result highlights the greater flexibility of EV charging over other forms of residential electricity demand.
31630.zh_abstract: 我们通过一项实地实验来衡量经济激励和道德劝说的“助推”在改变电动汽车充电时间方面的有效性。我们发现电动汽车车主对经济激励反应强烈，而助推则没有统计上显著的效果。当经济激励被取消时，充电时间恢复到干预前的行为，没有显示出习惯形成的证据，这强化了我们的发现，即“金钱很重要”。我们的充电价格响应度估计值比典型的家庭用电需求弹性大一个数量级。这一结果凸显了电动汽车充电相对于其他形式的住宅电力需求具有更大的灵活性。

31629.title: Welfare Estimates of Shifting Peak Travel
31629.zh_title: 转移高峰出行的福利估计
31629.authors: Robert W. Hahn, Robert D. Metcalfe, Eddy Tam
31629.abstract: We develop novel estimates of peak and off-peak price elasticities for urban mass transit demand in San Francisco using a large natural experiment with 3.6 million trip sessions and a natural field experiment that both have exogenous price subsidies. We then estimate the welfare impacts for these price subsidies using a sufficient statistics approach. Our analysis suggests that off-peak subsidies can increase welfare, but the positive effects are reduced when consumers take the decisions of others into account compared to when they do not. We also find a large variation in the welfare impacts of shifting travel to different periods, which is explained by differences in demand and congestion characteristics. Finally, we show that the targeting of subsidies can increase welfare, but need not do so if the regulator does not have accurate information on demand.
31629.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个包含360万次出行会话的大型自然实验和一个具有外生价格补贴的自然实地实验，为旧金山城市公共交通需求开发了新的高峰和非高峰价格弹性估计。然后，我们使用充分统计量方法估计这些价格补贴的福利影响。我们的分析表明，非高峰补贴可以提高福利，但当消费者考虑他人的决策时，其积极影响会降低，相比之下，当消费者不考虑他人决策时影响更大。我们还发现，将出行转移到不同时段的福利影响存在很大差异，这可以通过需求和拥堵特征的差异来解释。最后，我们表明，补贴的定向可以提高福利，但如果监管者没有准确的需求信息，则不一定如此。

31628.title: Retirement Consumption and Pension Design
31628.zh_title: 退休消费与养老金设计
31628.authors: Jonas Kolsrud, Camille Landais, Daniel Reck, Johannes Spinnewijn
31628.abstract: This paper analyzes consumption to evaluate the distributional effects of pension reforms. Using Swedish administrative data, we show that on average workers who retire earlier consume less while retired and experience larger drops in consumption around retirement. Interpreted via a theoretical model, these findings imply that reforms incentivizing later retirement incur a substantial consumption-smoothing cost. Turning to other features of pension policy, we find that reforms that redistribute based on early-career labor supply would have opposite-signed redistributive effects, while differentiating on wealth may help to target pension benefits toward those who are vulnerable to larger drops in consumption around retirement.
31628.zh_abstract: 本文通过分析消费来评估养老金改革的分配效应。利用瑞典的行政数据，我们表明，平均而言，较早退休的工人在退休后消费更少，并且在退休前后消费下降幅度更大。通过理论模型解释，这些发现意味着激励延迟退休的改革会带来显著的消费平滑成本。转向养老金政策的其他特征，我们发现，基于早期职业生涯劳动供给进行再分配的改革会产生相反符号的再分配效应，而根据财富进行区分可能有助于将养老金福利瞄准那些在退休前后容易遭受较大消费下降的人群。

31627.title: Are Software Automation and Teleworkers Substitutes? Preliminary Evidence from Japan
31627.zh_title: 软件自动化与远程工作者是替代品吗？来自日本的初步证据
31627.abstract: Digital technology is reshaping workplaces by enabling spatial separation of offices, known as telework, or remote intelligence (RI), and by facilitating automation of service sector tasks via artificial intelligence (AI). This paper is a first attempt to empirically investigate whether AI and RI are complements or substitutes in the service sector. It uses a worker-level panel of surveys collected from around 10,000 workers from pre-COVID-19 pandemic to late 2022, we find preliminary evidence that suggests that AI and RI are complements rather than substitutes. The evidence comes first from the positive correlation of investments in AI-promoting and RI-promoting software at the firm and worker level, and second from the positive correlation of workers' expectations regarding telework and software automation. The evidence is far from definitive but suggests that the complement-substitution question is a fruitful line for future research.
31627.zh_abstract: 数字技术正在重塑工作场所，它通过实现办公室的空间分离（即远程工作或远程智能）以及通过人工智能促进服务部门任务的自动化。本文是首次尝试实证研究服务业中人工智能与远程智能是互补品还是替代品。它利用从新冠疫情前到2022年底收集的约10,000名工人的工人层面面板调查数据，我们发现了初步证据，表明人工智能和远程智能是互补品而非替代品。证据首先来自企业和工人层面促进人工智能和促进远程智能的软件投资的正相关关系，其次来自工人对远程工作和软件自动化的期望的正相关关系。证据远非确定，但表明互补-替代问题是未来研究的一个富有成果的方向。

31626.title: Do PCI Facility Openings Differentially Affect AMI Patients by Individual Race and Community Segregation?
31626.zh_title: PCI设施开设是否因个体种族和社区隔离对AMI患者产生差异化影响？
31626.abstract: Percutaneous coronary intervention facility openings may have differential effects on treatment and health outcomes for Black versus White patients in residentially segregated versus integrated communities. This study looked at changes in patient treatment and health outcomes (same-day PCI, PCI during hospitalization, 30-day mortality, and 1-year mortality) after the opening of a PCI facility within a 15-minute drive of a community. Findings show that Black patients in integrated communities experienced the greatest benefits after a PCI opening for every outcome examined. Healthcare stakeholders may be able to use this data to prioritize PCI openings in communities that will derive the greatest benefits
31626.zh_abstract: 经皮冠状动脉介入治疗（PCI）设施的开设，可能对居住在不同种族隔离或融合社区中的黑人与白人患者的治疗和健康结果产生差异化影响。本研究考察了在社区15分钟车程内开设PCI设施后，患者治疗和健康结果（包括当日PCI、住院期间PCI、30天死亡率和1年死亡率）的变化。结果显示，在融合社区中的黑人患者在PCI设施开设后，每项考察结果均获得了最大益处。医疗保健利益相关者可以利用这些数据，优先在将获得最大收益的社区开设PCI设施。

31625.title: Supporting Women’s Livelihoods at Scale: Evidence from a Nationwide Multi-Faceted Program
31625.zh_title: 大规模支持女性生计：来自全国性多层面项目的证据
31625.authors: Ioana Botea, Andrew Brudevold-Newman, Markus Goldstein, Corinne Low, Gareth Roberts
31625.abstract: The success of multi-faceted “graduation” programs in reducing poverty raises three questions: Can their impacts be replicated when implemented by governments at scale? Can these bundled programs be streamlined for broader reach? And, do positive effects risk being offset by negative spillovers? This study examines a nationwide livelihood program implemented by the Zambian government and finds large, sustained increases in consumption and earnings—comparable to those of the most effective multi-faceted programs—without negative economic spillovers on non-beneficiaries. A treatment arm providing only financial capital achieved similar gains, consistent with evidence on the welfare impacts of direct cash transfers but with the added advantage of persistent income generation effects. These results point to a middle-ground approach between simple capital infusions, which often lack long-term impact, and complex graduation models that may be challenging for governments to implement at scale, offering a scalable and sustainable strategy for poverty alleviation.
31625.zh_abstract: 多层面“毕业”项目在减贫方面的成功引发了三个问题：当由政府大规模实施时，其影响能否被复制？这些捆绑式项目能否简化以扩大覆盖范围？积极影响是否可能被负面溢出效应所抵消？本研究考察了由赞比亚政府实施的一项全国性生计项目，发现消费和收入出现了大规模、持续的增长——与最有效的多层面项目相当——且未对非受益者产生负面经济溢出效应。仅提供金融资本的治疗组也取得了类似的收益，这与直接现金转移对福利影响的证据一致，但额外具有持续的收入生成效应。这些结果表明，在通常缺乏长期影响的简单资本注入与政府可能难以大规模实施的复杂毕业模式之间，存在一种中间路径，为减贫提供了一种可扩展且可持续的策略。

31624.title: Sex, Power, and Adolescence: Intimate Partner Violence and Sexual Behaviors
31624.zh_title: 性、权力与青春期：亲密伴侣暴力与性行为
31624.authors: Manisha Shah, Jennifer Seager, Joao Montalvao, Markus Goldstein
31624.abstract: Adolescents in Sub-Saharan Africa have some of the highest rates of intimate partner violence across the globe. This paper evaluates the impact of a randomized controlled trial that offers females a goal setting activity to improve their sexual and reproductive health outcomes and offers their male partners a soccer intervention, which educates and inspires young men to make better sexual and reproductive health choices. Both interventions reduce female reports of intimate partner violence. Impacts are larger among females who were already sexually active at baseline. We develop a model to understand the mechanisms at play. The soccer intervention improves male attitudes around violence and risky sexual behaviors. Females in the goal setting arm take more control of their sexual and reproductive health by exiting violent relationships. Both of these mechanisms drive reductions in IPV.
31624.zh_abstract: 撒哈拉以南非洲的青少年拥有全球最高的亲密伴侣暴力发生率之一。本文评估了一项随机对照试验的影响，该试验为女性提供目标设定活动以改善其性健康和生殖健康结果，并为她们的男性伴侣提供足球干预，以教育和激励年轻男性做出更好的性健康和生殖健康选择。两项干预措施均减少了女性报告的亲密伴侣暴力。在基线时已有性行为的女性中，影响更大。我们构建了一个模型来理解其中的机制。足球干预改善了男性对暴力和危险性行为的看法。目标设定组的女性通过退出暴力关系，更多地掌控了自己的性健康和生殖健康。这两种机制共同推动了亲密伴侣暴力的减少。

31623.title: Which Mexicans Are White? Enumerator-Assigned Race in the 1930 Census and the Socioeconomic Integration of Mexican Americans
31623.zh_title: 哪些墨西哥人是白人？1930年人口普查中普查员指定的种族与墨西哥裔美国人的社会经济融合
31623.abstract: The authors explore unique complete-count data from the 1930 Census in which a respondent’s race was assigned by enumerators and “Mexican” was one of the possible responses. Census enumerators frequently and selectively assigned a non-Mexican race—predominantly “white”—to U.S.-born individuals of Mexican ancestry. As a result, using enumerator-assigned race to identify Mexican Americans misses a sizeable fraction of the relevant population and significantly understates this group’s socioeconomic attainment. The propensity for Census enumerators to identify Mexican Americans as white varied enormously across U.S. counties, and this variation is strongly associated with both the educational attainment of U.S.-born Mexican Americans observed in the 1940 Census and the amount of return migration by Mexican immigrants during the 1930s. As such, this variation may help to identify local environments that were more favorable for the integration of Mexican Americans.
31623.zh_abstract: 作者们探索了1930年人口普查中独特的完整计数数据，其中受访者的种族由普查员指定，而“墨西哥人”是可能的回答之一。人口普查员经常且有选择性地将非墨西哥种族——主要是“白人”——指定给在美国出生的墨西哥裔个体。因此，使用普查员指定的种族来识别墨西哥裔美国人会遗漏相当大比例的相关人口，并显著低估该群体的社会经济成就。普查员将墨西哥裔美国人识别为白人的倾向在美国各县之间差异巨大，这种差异与1940年人口普查中观察到的美国出生墨西哥裔美国人的教育程度以及1930年代墨西哥移民的回流数量密切相关。因此，这种差异可能有助于识别对墨西哥裔美国人融合更有利的当地环境。

31622.title: Innovation Market Failures and the Design of New Climate Policy Instruments
31622.zh_title: 创新市场失灵与新气候政策工具的设计
31622.authors: Sarah C. Armitage, Noël Bakhtian, Adam B. Jaffe
31622.abstract: Moving beyond the combination of adoption subsidies, standards, and (albeit limited) attempts at carbon pricing that largely characterized US climate policy over the past decade, recent climate-related legislation has transformed not only the scale of US climate activities but also the policy mechanisms adopted. Newly scaled policy instruments—including demonstration projects, loan guarantees, green banks, and regional technology hubs—are motivated not only by unpriced carbon externalities but also by innovation market failures. This paper maps the economics literature on innovation market failures and other frictions to the stated goals of these policy instruments, with the goal of focusing discussions about how to implement these policies as effectively as possible. The paper also discusses how program evaluation can help to illuminate which market failures are most relevant in a particular context and which policy instruments are most targeted to them.
31622.zh_abstract: 超越过去十年美国气候政策主要特征的采用补贴、标准以及（尽管有限）碳定价尝试的组合，近期与气候相关的立法不仅改变了美国气候活动的规模，也改变了所采用的政策机制。新近扩大的政策工具——包括示范项目、贷款担保、绿色银行和区域技术中心——其动机不仅来自未定价的碳外部性，也来自创新市场失灵。本文将关于创新市场失灵和其他摩擦的经济学文献与这些政策工具的既定目标进行映射，旨在聚焦关于如何尽可能有效地实施这些政策的讨论。本文还讨论了项目评估如何有助于揭示在特定背景下哪些市场失灵最为相关，以及哪些政策工具最具针对性。

31621.title: Tax Credits for Clean Electricity: The Distributional Impacts of Supply-Push Policies in the Power Sector
31621.zh_title: 清洁电力税收抵免：电力部门供给推动政策的分配效应
31621.authors: Maxwell L. Brown, Jon M. Becker, Jared Carbone, Teagan Goforth, James McFarland, Destenie Nock, Kristina Pitman, Daniel C. Steinberg
31621.abstract: We evaluate distributional and efficiency consequences of the bulk power clean electricity tax credits authorized by the 2022 Inflation Reduction Act. To do so, we link detailed electricity capacity expansion, computable general equilibrium, data-rich microsimulation, and air pollution models to estimate the policy incidence in terms of economic welfare and health impacts across a wide range of demographic groups. We evaluate the tradeoff between policy efficiency and income progressivity by comparing the tax credits to cap-and-trade policies that vary revenue recycling approaches. Under the scenarios analyzed the bulk power tax credits lead to increased clean electricity technology deployment resulting in a reallocation of capital from elsewhere in the economy, higher prices for capital and other goods, lower power prices, and lower emissions. The tax credits yield progressive outcomes for both economic welfare and health impacts. The health benefits exceed total policy costs and provide greater benefits for low-income and historically-marginalized households given the coincidence of household and emission source locations.
31621.zh_abstract: 我们评估了2022年《通胀削减法案》授权的电力批发清洁电力税收抵免的分配和效率后果。为此，我们链接了详细的电力容量扩展模型、可计算一般均衡模型、数据丰富的微观模拟模型和空气污染模型，以估计该政策在广泛人口群体中的经济福利和健康影响方面的政策归宿。我们通过将税收抵免与采用不同收入循环方式的限额与交易政策进行比较，评估了政策效率与收入累进性之间的权衡。在所分析的场景下，电力批发税收抵免导致清洁电力技术部署增加，导致资本从经济其他部门重新配置，资本和其他商品价格上涨，电力价格下降，以及排放减少。税收抵免在经济福利和健康影响方面均产生了累进性结果。健康收益超过了总政策成本，并且由于家庭和排放源位置的重合，为低收入和历史边缘化家庭带来了更大的收益。

31620.title: What Predicts the Growth of Small Firms? Evidence from Tanzanian Commercial Loan Data
31620.zh_title: 什么预测了小企业的增长？来自坦桑尼亚商业贷款数据的证据
31620.authors: Mia Ellis, Cynthia Kinnan, Margaret S. McMillan, Sarah Shaukat
31620.abstract: Not all firms have equal capacity to absorb productive credit. Identifying those with higher potential may have large consequences for productivity. We collect detailed survey data on small- and medium-sized Tanzanian firms who borrow from a large commercial bank, which in turn raises funds via international capital markets. Using machine learning methods to identify predictors of loan growth, we document, first, that we achieve high rates of predictive power. Second, “soft” information (entrepreneurs’ motivations for entrepreneurship and constraints faced) has predictive power over and above administrative data (sector, age, etc.). Third, there is a different and larger set of predictors for women than men, consistent with greater barriers to efficient capital allocation among female entrepreneurs.
31620.zh_abstract: 并非所有企业都具有同等的吸收生产性信贷的能力。识别具有更高潜力的企业可能对生产率产生重大影响。我们收集了来自一家大型商业银行借款的坦桑尼亚中小企业的详细调查数据，该银行通过国际资本市场筹集资金。使用机器学习方法识别贷款增长的预测因素，我们首先发现，我们实现了较高的预测能力。其次，“软”信息（企业家的创业动机和面临的约束）具有超越行政数据（行业、年龄等）的预测能力。第三，女性的预测因素与男性不同且更多，这与女性企业家在有效资本配置方面面临更大障碍的证据一致。

31675.title: From Retributive to Restorative: An Alternative Approach to Justice in Schools
31675.zh_title: 从惩罚到修复：学校正义的替代路径
31675.authors: Anjali Adukia, Benjamin Feigenberg, Fatemeh Momeni
31675.abstract: School districts historically approached conflict-resolution from the perspective that suspending disruptive students was necessary to protect their classmates, even if this caused harm to perceived offenders. Restorative practices (RP) – focused on reparation, accountability, and shared ownership of disciplinary justice – are designed to address undesirable behavior without harming students. We study Chicago Public Schools’ adoption of RP and find that suspensions and arrests decreased, driven by effects for Black students. We find null effects on test-score value added, ruling out meaningful average declines. We estimate a 15% decrease in out-of-school arrests, consistent with RP substantively changing student behavior.
31675.zh_abstract: 学区历来以这样的视角处理冲突：认为停学处分扰乱秩序的学生对于保护其同学是必要的，即使这会对被视为违规者造成伤害。修复性实践（RP）——聚焦于赔偿、问责以及对纪律正义的共同拥有——旨在在不伤害学生的情况下解决不良行为。我们研究了芝加哥公立学校对RP的采纳，发现停学和逮捕数量有所下降，这一效应主要由黑人学生驱动。我们发现对考试成绩增值的影响为零，排除了有意义的平均下降。我们估计校外逮捕减少了15%，这与RP实质性改变学生行为的结果一致。
31675.meta: Programs：CH, ED；JEL：I0, I20, I21, I24, J0, J01, J08, J18, K39

31674.title: Economic Decision-Making Skill Predicts Income in Two Countries
31674.zh_title: 经济决策技能预测两个国家的收入
31674.authors: Andrew Caplin, David J. Deming, Søren Leth-Petersen, Ben Weidmann
31674.abstract: Jobs increasingly require good decision-making. Workers are valued not only for how much they can do, but also for their ability to decide what to do. In this paper we measure the ability to make good decisions about resource allocation, which we call economic decision-making skill. Our assessment requires an intuitive understanding of comparative advantage and is motivated by a model where decision-makers strategically acquire information about factor productivity under time and effort constraints. Economic decision-making skill strongly predicts labor earnings in representative samples of full-time workers in the U.S. and Denmark, conditional on education, IQ, numeracy, and other covariates. Economic decision-making skill is more valuable in management and other decision-intensive occupations.
31674.zh_abstract: 工作越来越需要良好的决策能力。员工的价值不仅取决于他们能完成多少工作，还取决于他们决定做什么的能力。在本文中，我们衡量了关于资源分配做出良好决策的能力，我们称之为经济决策技能。我们的评估要求对比较优势有直观理解，并受一个模型的启发，在该模型中，决策者在时间和精力约束下策略性地获取关于要素生产率的信息。在针对美国和丹麦全职工作者的代表性样本中，经济决策技能在控制教育、智商、计算能力及其他协变量的情况下，强烈预测劳动收入。经济决策技能在管理和其他决策密集型职业中更具价值。

31673.title: Externalities from Medical Innovation: Evidence from Organ Transplantation
31673.zh_title: 医疗创新的外部性：来自器官移植的证据
31673.authors: Kevin Callison, Michael E. Darden, Keith F. Teltser
31673.abstract: We evaluate the introduction of direct-acting antiviral (DAA) therapy for Hepatitis C (HCV) on liver transplant allocation in the United States. We develop a model of listing and organ acceptance behavior for patients with both HCV-positive and HCV-negative end-stage liver disease. In the model, DAAs obviate the need for transplant for some HCV-positive patients, which shortens the waiting list, potentially benefiting HCV-negative registrants and inducing marginal HCV-negative patients to list. Using data from the universe of transplants between 2005 and 2019, we find that DAA availability resulted in an additional 5,682 liver transplants to HCV-negative recipients between 2014 and 2019, driven in part by a 37% average annual increase in HCV-negative waiting list registrations. Our estimates imply that DAAs generated $\$7.52$ billion in positive externalities for HCV-negative patients during this period.
31673.zh_abstract: 我们评估了针对丙型肝炎（HCV）的直接抗病毒（DAA）疗法引入对美国肝移植分配的影响。我们为HCV阳性和HCV阴性终末期肝病患者建立了一个关于登记和器官接受行为的模型。在该模型中，DAA使部分HCV阳性患者无需移植，从而缩短了等待名单，可能使HCV阴性登记人受益，并诱导边缘HCV阴性患者登记。利用2005年至2019年间所有移植数据，我们发现DAA的可及性在2014年至2019年间为HCV阴性受者额外带来了5682例肝移植，部分原因是HCV阴性等待名单登记人数年均增长37%。我们的估计表明，在此期间，DAA为HCV阴性患者产生了75.2亿美元的正外部性。

31672.title: Households' Response to the Wealth Effects of Inflation
31672.zh_title: 家庭对通货膨胀财富效应的反应
31672.authors: Philip Schnorpfeil, Michael Weber, Andreas Hackethal
31672.abstract: We study the redistributive effects of inflation combining administrative bank data with an information provision experiment during an episode of historic inflation. On average, households are well-informed about prevailing inflation and are concerned about its impact on their wealth; yet, while many households know about inflation eroding nominal assets, most are unaware of nominal-debt erosion. Once they receive information on the debt-erosion channel, households update upwards their beliefs about nominal debt and their own real net wealth. These changes in beliefs causally affect actual consumption and hypothetical debt decisions. Our findings suggest that real wealth mediates the sensitivity of consumption to inflation once households are aware of the wealth effects of inflation.
31672.zh_abstract: 我们结合行政银行数据与一次历史性通胀时期的信息提供实验，研究了通胀的再分配效应。平均而言，家庭对当前通胀了解充分，并担忧其对自身财富的影响；然而，尽管许多家庭知道通胀侵蚀名义资产，但大多数人不知道名义债务被侵蚀。一旦他们收到关于债务侵蚀渠道的信息，家庭会向上更新他们对名义债务和自身实际净财富的信念。这些信念的变化因果性地影响了实际消费和假设的债务决策。我们的发现表明，一旦家庭意识到通胀的财富效应，实际财富会调节消费对通胀的敏感性。
31672.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：D12, D14, D83, D84, E21, E31, E52

31671.title: Breakthroughs in Historical Record Linking Using Genealogy Data: The Census Tree Project
31671.zh_title: 利用家谱数据实现历史记录链接的突破：人口普查树项目
31671.authors: Kasey Buckles, Adrian Haws, Joseph Price, Haley E.B. Wilbert
31671.abstract: The Census Tree is the largest-ever database of record links among the historical U.S. censuses, with over 700 million links for people living in the United States between 1850 and 1940.
