These high-quality links allow researchers in the social sciences and other disciplines to construct a longitudinal dataset that is highly representative of the population. In this paper, we describe our process for creating the Census Tree, beginning with a collection of links contributed by the users of a free online genealogy platform. We then use these links as training data for a machine learning algorithm to make new matches and incorporate other recent efforts to link the historical U.S. censuses. Finally, we introduce a procedure for filtering the links and adjudicating disagreements. Our complete Census Tree achieves match rates between adjacent censuses that are between 69 and 86% for men, and between 58 and 79% for women. To demonstrate the advantages of the Census Tree, we extend the work of Abramitzky, Boustan, Jácome, and Pérez (2021) to include intergenerational mobility estimates for additional immigrant nationalities and for women.
31671.zh_abstract: 人口普查树是有史以来最大的历史美国人口普查记录链接数据库，包含超过7亿个链接，涵盖1850年至1940年间居住在美国的人口。这些高质量的链接使社会科学及其他学科的研究人员能够构建一个高度代表人口的面板数据集。在本文中，我们描述了创建人口普查树的过程，首先从免费在线家谱平台的用户贡献的链接集合开始。然后，我们使用这些链接作为机器学习算法的训练数据，以进行新的匹配，并整合其他近期链接历史美国人口普查的努力。最后，我们引入了一个过滤链接和裁决分歧的程序。我们完整的人口普查树在相邻普查之间的匹配率，男性为69%至86%，女性为58%至79%。为展示人口普查树的优势，我们扩展了Abramitzky、Boustan、Jácome和Pérez（2021）的工作，纳入了更多移民国籍和女性的代际流动性估计。

31670.title: The Digital Welfare of Nations: New Measures of Welfare Gains and Inequality
31670.zh_title: 国家的数字福利：福利增益与不平等的新度量
31670.authors: Erik Brynjolfsson, Avinash Collis, Asad Liaqat, Daley Kutzman, Haritz Garro, Daniel Deisenroth, Nils Wernerfelt, Jae Joon Lee
31670.abstract: Digital goods can generate large benefits for consumers, but these benefits are largely unmeasured in the national accounts, including GDP and productivity. In this paper, we measure welfare gains from 10 popular digital goods across 13 countries by conducting large-scale incentivized online choice experiments on representative samples of nearly 40,000 people. We estimate that these goods—many of which are free to users—generate over $\$2.5$ trillion in aggregate consumer welfare across these countries per year, which is roughly equivalent to 6% of their combined GDP. We find that lower-income individuals and lower-income countries obtain relatively larger welfare gains from these goods compared to higher-income individuals and countries. This suggests that digital goods may reduce inequality in welfare within and across countries by disproportionately benefiting lower-income groups.
31670.zh_abstract: 数字商品可以为消费者带来巨大收益，但这些收益在国民账户（包括GDP和生产率）中基本未被衡量。在本文中，我们通过对近4万人的代表性样本进行大规模激励性在线选择实验，衡量了13个国家中10种流行数字商品的福利增益。我们估计，这些商品——其中许多对用户免费——每年在这些国家产生超过2.5万亿美元的消费者总福利，大致相当于其GDP总和的6%。我们发现，与高收入个人和高收入国家相比，低收入个人和低收入国家从这些商品中获得的相对福利增益更大。这表明，数字商品可能通过不成比例地惠及低收入群体，减少国家内部和国家之间的福利不平等。

31669.title: The Intergenerational Transmission of Housing Wealth
31669.authors: N. Meltem Daysal, Michael F. Lovenheim, David N. Wasser
31669.abstract: Rising wealth inequality has spurred an increased interest in understanding how and why wealth is correlated across generations. We exploit plausibly exogenous variation in housing wealth driven by home price changes in different areas to isolate the causal impact of parental housing wealth during different childhood periods on children’s long-run wealth accumulation. Using population-level Danish administrative data, we find that 27% and 25% of each Krone of parental housing wealth change during early-childhood is transmitted to children’s overall and housing wealth in adulthood, respectively. The corresponding transmission rates for parental housing wealth changes during middle-childhood are 25% and 15%, with a transmission to non-housing wealth of 10%. There is little evidence of transmission of parental housing wealth changes that occur during the teenage years. Examining mechanisms, we find that parental housing wealth changes in early and middle-childhood lead to modest increases in adult children’s home ownership, educational attainment, and earnings. However, earnings and education can explain only 20-30% of the intergenerational transmission of parental wealth gains during these periods. We argue that the transmission of parental housing wealth changes in childhood are driven in large part by changes to unobserved household environment and parental behaviors that are passed on to children and shape their savings behavior in adulthood.
31669.zh_abstract: 财富不平等加剧激发了对理解财富为何以及如何在代际间相关的兴趣。我们利用不同地区房价变动所驱动的住房财富外生变化，来隔离不同童年时期父母住房财富对子女长期财富积累的因果影响。使用丹麦人口层面的行政数据，我们发现，父母在儿童早期住房财富变化的27%和25%分别传递给了子女成年后的总财富和住房财富。父母在儿童中期住房财富变化的相应传递率为25%和15%，其中对非住房财富的传递率为10%。几乎没有证据表明青少年时期父母住房财富变化存在传递。在考察机制时，我们发现父母在儿童早期和中期住房财富变化导致成年子女的住房拥有率、教育程度和收入适度增加。然而，收入和受教育程度只能解释这些时期父母财富收益代际传递的20-30%。我们认为，童年时期父母住房财富变化的传递在很大程度上是由未观测到的家庭环境和父母行为的变化驱动的，这些变化传递给子女并塑造了他们成年后的储蓄行为。

31668.title: Incentivizing Innovation in Open Source: Evidence from the GitHub Sponsors Program
31668.zh_title: 激励开源创新：来自GitHub赞助者计划的证据
31668.authors: Annamaria Conti, Vansh Gupta, Jorge Guzman, Maria P. Roche
31668.abstract: Open source is key to innovation, but we know little about how to incentivize it. In this paper, we examine the impact of a program providing monetary incentives to motivate innovators to contribute to open source. The Sponsors program was introduced by GitHub in May 2019 and enabled organizations and individuals alike to reward developers for their open source work on the platform. To study this program, we collect fine-grained data on about 100,000 GitHub users, their activities, and sponsorship events. Using a difference-in-differences approach, we document two main effects. The first is that developers who opted into the program, which does not entail receiving a financial reward, increased their output after the program’s launch. The second is that the actual receipt of sponsorship has a long-lasting negative effect on innovation, as measured by new repository creation, regardless of the amount of money received. We estimate a similar decline in other community-oriented tasks, but not in coding effort. While the program’s net effect on users’ innovative output appears to be positive, our study shows that receiving an extrinsic reward may crowd out developers’ intrinsic motivation, diverting their effort away from community and service-oriented activities on open source.
31668.zh_abstract: 开源是创新的关键，但我们对其激励方式知之甚少。在本文中，我们考察了一个为激励创新者为开源做贡献而提供货币激励的计划的影响。GitHub于2019年5月推出了赞助者计划，使组织和个人都能奖励开发者在平台上的开源工作。为研究该计划，我们收集了约10万GitHub用户、其活动及赞助事件的细粒度数据。使用双重差分方法，我们记录了两个主要效应。第一，选择加入该计划（这并不涉及获得财务奖励）的开发者在计划启动后增加了产出。第二，实际获得赞助对创新（以新仓库创建衡量）产生了持久的负面影响，无论收到的金额多少。我们估计在其他面向社区的任务中也出现了类似的下降，但在编码努力方面没有。尽管该计划对用户创新产出的净效应似乎是正的，但我们的研究表明，接受外在奖励可能会挤出开发者的内在动机，将他们的努力从开源社区和服务导向的活动转移开。

31667.title: Ending Pay for PBM Performance: Consequences for Prescription Drug Prices, Utilization, and Government Spending
31667.zh_title: 终止按绩效支付药品福利管理：对处方药价格、使用及政府支出的影响
31667.abstract: Proposed “delinking” legislation would prohibit Pharmacy Benefit Managers (PBMs) from being remunerated based on the rebates and discounts they negotiate for drug insurance plans serving Medicare beneficiaries. This policy would significantly change drug pricing and utilization and shift billions of dollars annually from patients and taxpayers to drug manufacturers and retail pharmacy companies. Annual federal spending on Medicare Part D premiums would increase $\$3$ billion to $\$10$ billion plus any concomitant increase in Medicare subsidies for out-of-pocket expenses. All of these consequences stem from the fact that PBMs are hired to obtain rebates and discounts but would no longer be compensated based on their results. The quantitative estimates utilize a large body of economic research showing how much “pay for performance” matters for economic outcomes. The price-theoretic models also account for various market frictions and imperfections including market power, coordination costs, tax distortions, and incomplete innovation incentives.
31667.zh_abstract: 拟议的“脱钩”立法将禁止药品福利管理公司（PBM）根据其为服务医疗保险受益人的药品保险计划协商的返利和折扣获得报酬。这项政策将显著改变药品定价和使用模式，并每年将数十亿美元从患者和纳税人转移至药品制造商和零售药房公司。联邦在医疗保险D部分保费上的年度支出将增加30亿至100亿美元，同时医疗保险对自付费用的补贴也可能随之增加。所有这些后果源于一个事实：PBM被雇佣来获取返利和折扣，但将不再根据其业绩获得报酬。定量估计利用了大量经济研究，这些研究表明“按绩效付费”对经济结果的重要性。价格理论模型还考虑了各种市场摩擦和不完善因素，包括市场势力、协调成本、税收扭曲和不完全的创新激励。
31667.meta: Programs：IO, LE, PE；JEL：D43, D71, I13, J24, L14, L51

31666.title: How Credible is the Credibility Revolution?
31666.abstract: When economists analyze a well-conducted RCT or natural experiment and find a statistically significant effect, they conclude the null of no effect is unlikely to be true. But how frequently is this conclusion warranted? The answer depends on the proportion of tested nulls that are true and the power of the tests. I model the distribution of t-statistics in leading economics journals. Using my preferred model, 65% of narrowly rejected null hypotheses and 41% of all rejected null hypotheses with |t|<10 are likely to be false rejections. For the null to have only a .05 probability of being true requires a t of 5.48.
31666.zh_abstract: 当经济学家分析一项设计良好的随机对照试验或自然实验并发现统计显著效应时，他们得出结论认为无效应原假设不太可能成立。但这一结论在多大程度上是合理的？答案取决于被检验的原假设中真实的比例以及检验的统计功效。我对顶级经济学期刊中t统计量的分布进行了建模。使用我偏好的模型，65%的勉强拒绝的原假设和41%的所有被拒绝且|t|<10的原假设很可能是错误拒绝。要使原假设为真的概率仅为0.05，需要t值达到5.48。
31666.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：A10, C12

31665.title: Wage and Earnings Inequality Between and Within Occupations: The Role of Labor Supply
31665.zh_title: 职业间与职业内的工资和收入不平等：劳动供给的作用
31665.authors: Andrés Erosa, Luisa Fuster, Gueorgui Kambourov, Richard Rogerson
31665.abstract: We document systematic differences in wage and earnings inequality between and within occupations and show that these differences are intimately related to systematic differences in labor supply across occupations. We then develop a variant of a Roy model in which earnings are a non-linear function of hours, with the extent of this non-linearity differing across occupations. In our theory, the interplay between heterogeneity in tastes for leisure and occupational differences in non-linearities affects the sorting of workers. Moreover, this interplay is crucial to account for the facts on the distributions of hours, wages, and earnings within and across occupations.
31665.zh_abstract: 我们记录了职业间和职业内工资与收入不平等的系统性差异，并表明这些差异与职业间劳动供给的系统性差异密切相关。然后，我们开发了一个罗伊模型的变体，其中收入是工时的非线性函数，且这种非线性程度在不同职业间存在差异。在我们的理论中，休闲偏好的异质性与职业间非线性的差异相互作用，影响了工人的分类。此外，这种相互作用对于解释职业内部和跨职业的工时、工资和收入分布的事实至关重要。

31664.title: Portfolio Management in Private Equity
31664.zh_title: 私募股权中的投资组合管理
31664.authors: Gregory W. Brown, Celine Yue Fei, David T. Robinson
31664.abstract: General Partners (GPs) in private equity face a trade-off between focusing their skills and effort on fewer investments to earn higher returns, or investing more broadly to reduce risk through diversification. Using a novel, deal-level dataset of 5,925 global investments from 1999 to 2016, we show that these portfolio considerations are important for understanding fund-level private equity returns. The largest investments in PE funds typically have the lowest returns on average, but are also the least risky. Returns and risk are both increasing in industry or geographic concentration. And while GP-specific return variation (e.g., skill) only accounts for 4%-6% of the total return variation of a typical investment, it accounts for around 40% of the return variation at the fund level. These findings show that GPs use portfolio construction, and not just deal selection, to seek risk-adjusted fund-level returns.
31664.zh_abstract: 私募股权中的普通合伙人（GP）面临一个权衡：是将技能和精力集中在更少的投资上以获取更高回报，还是通过多元化投资更广泛地分散风险。利用1999年至2016年5925笔全球投资的新颖交易层面数据集，我们表明这些投资组合考虑因素对于理解基金层面的私募股权回报至关重要。私募股权基金中最大的投资通常平均回报最低，但风险也最小。回报和风险都随着行业或地理集中度的提高而增加。虽然GP特定的回报变异（例如技能）仅占典型投资总回报变异的4%-6%，但它却占基金层面回报变异的约40%。这些发现表明，GP不仅通过交易选择，还通过投资组合构建来寻求风险调整后的基金层面回报。
31664.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：G10, G11, G2, G20, G24

31663.title: Zero-Sum Environments, the Evolution of Effort-Suppressing Beliefs, and Economic Development
31663.zh_title: 零和博弈环境、抑制努力的信念的演化与经济发展
31663.authors: Augustin Bergeron, Jean-Paul Carvalho, Joseph Henrich, Nathan Nunn, Jonathan L. Weigel
31663.abstract: We study the evolution of belief systems that suppress productive effort, such as beliefs about envy, witchcraft, the importance of luck for success, or disdain for competitive effort. In our framework, demotivating beliefs evolve when interactions are zero-sum, i.e., where one person’s gain comes at others’ expense. They improve material welfare but reduce subjective well-being. The model delivers testable predictions about the relationship between the degree of zero-sumness, demotivating beliefs, material welfare, subjective well-being, and long-run economic development. We find that the predictions are supported by data from two samples in the Democratic Republic of Congo, as well as global evidence from the World Values Survey and the European Values Study.
31663.zh_abstract: 我们研究了抑制生产性努力的信念体系（例如关于嫉妒、巫术、运气对成功重要性的信念，或对竞争性努力的蔑视）的演化。在我们的框架中，当互动是零和博弈（即一方的收益以他人为代价）时，消极信念会演化。它们改善了物质福利，但降低了主观幸福感。该模型提供了关于零和程度、消极信念、物质福利、主观幸福感与长期经济发展之间关系的可检验预测。我们发现，这些预测得到了来自刚果民主共和国两个样本的数据以及世界价值观调查和欧洲价值观研究的全球证据的支持。

31662.title: A Theory of Trade Policy Transitions
31662.authors: Renee Bowen, J. Lawrence Broz, B. Peter Rosendorff
31662.abstract: Trade policy is set by domestic political bargaining between globalists and protectionists, representing owners of factors specific to export and import-competing sectors respectively. Consistent with the post-Civil War Era of Restriction, protectionists implement high tariffs when status quo tariffs are low. When status quo tariffs are high, reciprocal free trade combined with domestic transfers to protectionists are implemented, explaining the 1930s Era of Reciprocity with Re- distribution. Consensus emerges for Retreat from free trade when imports are high and domestic transfers are low, suggesting that US protectionist turn in the late 2010s was in part due to low levels of social transfers.
31662.zh_abstract: 贸易政策由国内全球主义者和保护主义者之间的政治博弈决定，他们分别代表出口和进口竞争部门的特定要素所有者。与内战后限制时代一致，当现状关税较低时，保护主义者实施高关税。当现状关税较高时，则实施互惠自由贸易并辅以对保护主义者的国内转移支付，这解释了1930年代伴随再分配的互惠时代。当进口高而国内转移支付低时，会出现从自由贸易退却的共识，这表明2010年代末美国保护主义转向部分是由于社会转移支付水平较低。

31661.title: Global Supply Chains: The Looming “Great Reallocation”
31661.zh_title: 全球供应链：迫在眉睫的“大重新配置”
31661.abstract: Global supply chains have come under unprecedented stress as a result of US-China trade tensions, the Covid-19 pandemic, and geopolitical shocks. We document shifts in the pattern of US participation in global value chains over the last four decades, in terms of partner countries, products, and modes, with a focus on the last five years (2017-2022). The available data point to a looming “great reallocation” in supply chain activity: Direct US sourcing from China has decreased, with low-wage locations (principally: Vietnam) and nearshoring/friendshoring alternatives (notably: Mexico) gaining in import share. The production line positioning of the US’ imports has also become more upstream, which is indicative of some reshoring of production stages. We sound several cautionary notes over the policies that have set this reallocation in motion: It is unclear if these measures will reduce US dependence on supply chains linked to China, and there are moreover already signs that prices of imports from Vietnam and Mexico are on the rise.
31661.zh_abstract: 由于美中贸易紧张、新冠疫情和地缘政治冲击，全球供应链面临前所未有的压力。我们记录了美国过去四十年参与全球价值链模式的变化，涉及伙伴国、产品和模式，重点关注最近五年（2017-2022年）。现有数据表明，供应链活动正面临一场迫在眉睫的“大重新配置”：美国从中国的直接采购减少，低工资地区（主要是越南）以及近岸/友岸外包替代方案（尤其是墨西哥）的进口份额增加。美国进口的生产线定位也变得更加上游，这暗示了某些生产阶段的回流。我们对推动这一重新配置的政策提出了几点警示：尚不清楚这些措施是否会减少美国对与中国相关供应链的依赖，而且已有迹象表明从越南和墨西哥进口的价格正在上涨。

31660.title: Limits to Competition: Strategies for Promoting Jurisdictional Cooperation
31660.zh_title: 竞争的局限：促进辖区合作的策略
31660.abstract: Inefficiencies from tax competition may result in governments seeking to limit fiscal competition via tax treaties, harmonization, minimum tax rates, or interjurisdictional cooperation. I propose a general model applicable to studying many types of taxing instruments, which allows for the comparison of various policy responses to promote jurisdictional cooperation. Comparing across policies, the model suggests a clear revenue dominance of partial harmonization among a subset of jurisdictions. Minimum tax rates revenue-dominate complete harmonization, but fail to raise revenues as much as partial harmonization. A selective review of the empirical literature identifies evidence consistent with the predictions of the theoretical model. The framework sketched in this paper can be further enriched by researchers seeking to determine the welfare effects of policy responses to interjurisdictional competition.
31660.zh_abstract: 税收竞争导致的低效率可能促使政府通过税收协定、协调、最低税率或辖区间合作来限制财政竞争。我提出了一个适用于研究多种税收工具类型的通用模型，该模型允许比较各种促进辖区合作的政策应对措施。跨政策比较表明，在部分辖区间进行部分协调具有明显的收入优势。最低税率在收入上优于完全协调，但未能像部分协调那样提高收入。对实证文献的选择性回顾发现了与理论模型预测一致的证据。本文勾勒的框架可供研究人员进一步丰富，以确定应对辖区间竞争的政策措施的福利效应。

31659.title: Large Shocks Travel Fast
31659.authors: Alberto Cavallo, Francesco Lippi, Ken Miyahara
31659.abstract: We leverage the inflation upswing of 2022 and various granular datasets to identify robust price-setting patterns following a large supply shock. We show that the frequency of price changes increases dramatically after a large shock. We set up a parsimonious New Keynesian model and calibrate it to fit the steady-state data before the shock. The model features a significant component of state-dependent decisions, implying that large cost shocks incite firms to react more swiftly than usual, resulting in a rapid pass-through to prices -- large shocks travel fast. Understanding this feature is crucial for interpreting recent inflation dynamics.
31659.zh_abstract: 我们利用2022年的通胀上升以及各种细粒度数据集，来识别在大型供给冲击后稳健的价格设定模式。我们表明，在大型冲击发生后，价格调整的频率会急剧增加。我们建立了一个简约的新凯恩斯主义模型，并根据冲击前的稳态数据对其进行校准。该模型包含一个显著的状态依赖决策成分，这意味着大型成本冲击会促使企业比平时更快地做出反应，从而导致价格快速传导——大型冲击传播迅速。理解这一特征对于解释近期的通胀动态至关重要。

31658.title: Quantifying Climate Change Loss and Damage Consistent with a Social Cost of Greenhouse Gases
31658.zh_title: 量化与温室气体社会成本一致的气候变化损失与损害
31658.authors: Marshall Burke, Mustafa Zahid, Noah Diffenbaugh, Solomon M. Hsiang
31658.abstract: Climate change is generating demonstrable harm around the world. Political and legal efforts have sought to associate climate impacts with specific emissions, including in recent international policy discussion of Loss and Damage (L&D). However, no quantitative definition of L&D exists, nor does there exist a framework for linking specific emissions to specific damages. Here we develop such a framework, linking it explicitly to recent efforts to calculate the social cost of carbon dioxide (SC-CO2), and demonstrate its use in a variety of applications. We calculate that future damages from past emissions, one component of L&D, are at least an order of magnitude larger than historical damages from the same emissions, a more commonly discussed component of L&D: 1 ton of CO2 emitted in 1990 causes $\$4$ in global cumulative discounted damages by 2020 and an additional $\$327$ in discounted damages through 2100 (2% discount rate). These estimates of past and future damages from marginal emissions can be used to calculate L&D for a range of specific emitting activities: for instance, an individual taking one long-haul flight every year for the past decade will generate ~$\$5500$ in damages through 2100, the emissions associated with multiple oil majors between 1988-2015 have already caused $\$50$-200B of cumulative global economic damage by 2020, and CO2 emissions in the US since 1990 have caused ~$\$2$T in global damage through 2020, with India ($\$293$B) and Brazil ($\$167$B) being harmed the most. Carbon removal offers an alternative to transfer payments for settling L&D, but we show that it becomes increasingly ineffective in limiting damages as the delay between emission and recapture increases.
31658.zh_abstract: 气候变化正在全球范围内造成明显的危害。政治和法律努力试图将气候影响与特定排放联系起来，包括在近期关于损失与损害的国际政策讨论中。然而，目前既不存在损失与损害的定量定义，也不存在将特定排放与特定损害联系起来的框架。在此，我们开发了这样一个框架，将其与近期计算二氧化碳社会成本的努力明确联系起来，并展示了其在多种应用中的用途。我们计算出，过去排放造成的未来损害（损失与损害的一个组成部分）至少比同一排放造成的已发生损害（损失与损害中更常被讨论的组成部分）大一个数量级：1990年排放的1吨二氧化碳到2020年造成全球累计贴现损害4美元，并通过2100年额外造成贴现损害327美元（贴现率为2%）。这些对边际排放造成的过去和未来损害的估计可用于计算一系列特定排放活动的损失与损害：例如，过去十年每年乘坐一次长途航班的个人将在2100年前产生约5500美元的损害；1988年至2015年间多家大型石油公司的相关排放到2020年已造成500亿至2000亿美元的全球累计经济损失；美国自1990年以来的二氧化碳排放到2020年已造成约2万亿美元的全球损害，其中印度（2930亿美元）和巴西（1670亿美元）受害最严重。碳移除为通过转移支付解决损失与损害提供了替代方案，但我们表明，随着排放与重新捕获之间的延迟增加，碳移除在限制损害方面的效果会越来越差。

31657.title: Climate Change, Directed Innovation, and Energy Transition: The Long-run Consequences of the Shale Gas Revolution
31657.zh_title: 气候变化、定向创新与能源转型：页岩气革命的长期后果
31657.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Philippe Aghion, Lint Barrage, David Hémous
31657.abstract: We investigate the short- and long-term effects of a natural gas boom in an economy where energy can be produced with coal, natural gas, or clean sources and the direction of technology is endogenous. In the short run, a natural gas boom reduces carbon emissions by inducing substitution away from coal. Yet, the natural gas boom discourages innovation directed at clean energy, which delays and can even permanently prevent the energy transition to zero carbon. We formalize and quantitatively evaluate these forces using a benchmark model of directed technical change for the energy sector. Quantitatively, the technology response to the shale gas boom results in a significant increase in emissions as the US economy is pushed into a “fossil-fuel trap” where long-run innovations shift away from renewables. Overall, the shale gas boom reduces our measure of social welfare under laissez-faire, whereas, combined with carbon taxes and more generous green subsidies, it could have increased welfare substantially.
31657.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在一个能源可由煤炭、天然气或清洁能源生产且技术方向是内生的经济体中，天然气繁荣的短期和长期影响。短期内，天然气繁荣通过促使从煤炭转向替代而减少碳排放。然而，天然气繁荣抑制了针对清洁能源的创新，这可能会延迟甚至永久阻止向零碳的能源转型。我们使用一个针对能源部门的定向技术变革基准模型，对这些力量进行了形式化和定量评估。从定量角度看，对页岩气繁荣的技术反应导致排放显著增加，因为美国经济被推入一个“化石燃料陷阱”，长期创新从可再生能源转移开。总体而言，在自由放任政策下，页岩气繁荣降低了我们的社会福利衡量指标；而如果与碳税和更慷慨的绿色补贴相结合，它本可以大幅提高福利。
31657.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, PR；JEL：O30, O41, O44, Q33, Q43, Q54, Q55

31656.title: Composite Sorting
31656.authors: Job Boerma, Aleh Tsyvinski, Ruodu Wang, Zhenyuan Zhang
31656.abstract: We propose a new sorting framework: composite sorting. Composite sorting comprises of (1) distinct worker types assigned to the same occupation, and (2) a given worker type simultaneously being part of both positive and negative sorting. Composite sorting arises when fixed investments mitigate variable costs of mismatch. We completely characterize optimal sorting and additionally show it is more positive when mismatch costs are less concave. We then characterize equilibrium wages. Wages have a regional hierarchical structure − relative wages depend solely on sorting within skill groups. Quantitatively, composite sorting can generate a sizable portion of within-occupations wage dispersion in the US.
31656.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个新的分类框架：复合分类。复合分类包括：（1）不同的工人类型被分配到同一职业，以及（2）给定的工人类型同时参与正向和负向分类。当固定投资减轻了错配的可变成本时，复合分类就会出现。我们完全刻画了最优分类，并进一步表明，当错配成本不那么凹时，分类更倾向于正向。然后我们刻画了均衡工资。工资具有区域层级结构——相对工资仅取决于技能组内的分类。从定量角度看，复合分类可以解释美国职业内工资差异的相当大一部分。

31655.title: 'We Are Not Guinea Pigs’: The Effects of Disclosure of Medical Misconduct on Vaccine Compliance
31655.zh_title: “我们不是豚鼠”：医疗不当行为披露对疫苗依从性的影响
31655.abstract: In 1996, following an epidemic, Pfizer tested a new drug on 200 children in Muslim Nigeria. 11 children died while others were disabled. We study the effects of the disclosure, in 2000, of the deaths of Muslim children in the Pfizer trials on vaccine compliance among Muslim mothers. Muslim mothers reduced routine vaccination of children born after the 2000 disclosure. The effect was stronger for educated mothers and mothers residing in minority Muslim neighborhoods. The disclosure did not affect other health-seeking behavior of mothers. The results illustrate the potential spillover effects of perceived medical malpractice on future vaccine hesitancy.
31655.zh_abstract: 1996年，在一次疫情之后，辉瑞公司在尼日利亚穆斯林地区的200名儿童身上测试了一种新药。11名儿童死亡，其他儿童致残。我们研究了2000年辉瑞试验中穆斯林儿童死亡事件被披露后，对穆斯林母亲疫苗依从性的影响。穆斯林母亲减少了在2000年披露后出生的儿童的常规疫苗接种。这种影响在受过教育的母亲和居住在穆斯林少数族裔社区的母亲中更为强烈。该披露并未影响母亲的其他健康寻求行为。这些结果说明了感知到的医疗不当行为对未来疫苗犹豫的潜在溢出效应。
31655.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH；JEL：D83, I12, I14, I18, O12, Z12

31654.title: The Importance of Sound Monetary Policy: Some Lessons for Today from Canada’s Experience with Floating Exchange Rates Since 1950
31654.zh_title: 稳健货币政策的重要性：从加拿大自1950年以来浮动汇率经验中汲取的今日教训
31654.abstract: In this paper we revisit the Canadian experience with floating exchange rates since 1950. Canada was a pioneer in successfully adopting a floating exchange rate during the Bretton Woods pegged exchange rate regime. Since then, most advanced countries have followed the Canadian example.\nA key finding of our paper based on historical narrative and econometric analysis is that economic performance under floating depended on its monetary policy performance as Milton Friedman originally argued in his seminal 1953 article. Canadian monetary policy achieved low and stable inflation once it adopted inflation targeting as a nominal anchor. Also, as Friedman argued, Canada’s floating exchange rate provided it with a modicum of insulation from external shocks, especially commodity price shocks that influenced both the level and volatility of the real exchange rate over the past three decades. The Canadian experience with floating (along with that of other small open economies such as Australia, New Zealand and Sweden) and inflation targeting became a model for the conduct of monetary policy in emerging countries.
31654.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们重新审视了加拿大自1950年以来的浮动汇率经验。加拿大是在布雷顿森林体系固定汇率制度下成功采用浮动汇率的先驱。此后，大多数发达国家都效仿了加拿大的做法。基于历史叙述和计量经济学分析，我们论文的一个关键发现是，正如米尔顿·弗里德曼在其1953年的开创性文章中所论证的，浮动汇率下的经济表现取决于其货币政策表现。一旦加拿大采用通胀目标作为名义锚，其货币政策就实现了低且稳定的通胀。此外，正如弗里德曼所论证的，加拿大的浮动汇率为其提供了一定程度的外部冲击隔离，特别是影响了过去三十年实际汇率水平和波动性的商品价格冲击。加拿大的浮动汇率经验（以及澳大利亚、新西兰和瑞典等其他小型开放经济体的经验）和通胀目标制成为了新兴国家货币政策操作的典范。
31654.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E32, E52, F31, F32, N1

31653.title: Contexts of Convenience: Generalizing from Published Evaluations of School Finance Policies
31653.zh_title: 便利情境：从已发表的学校财政政策评估中进行概括
31653.authors: Danielle V. Handel, Eric A. Hanushek
31653.abstract: Recent attention to the causal identification of spending impacts provides improved estimates of spending outcomes in a variety of circumstances, but the estimates are substantially different across studies. Half of the variation in estimated funding impact on test scores and over three-quarters of the variation of impacts on school attainment reflect differences in the true parameters across study contexts. Unfortunately, inability to describe the circumstances underlying effective school spending impedes any attempts to generalize from the extant results to new policy situations. The evidence indicates that how funds are used is crucial to the outcomes but such factors as targeting of funds or court interventions fail to explain the existing pattern of results.
31653.zh_abstract: 近期对支出影响因果识别的关注，提供了在各种情况下改进的支出结果估计，但这些估计在不同研究中存在显著差异。估计的资助对考试成绩影响的一半变异，以及资助对学业完成影响的超过四分之三的变异，反映了不同研究情境下真实参数的差异。不幸的是，无法描述有效学校支出所依据的情境，阻碍了任何从现有结果向新政策情境进行概括的尝试。证据表明，资金如何使用对结果至关重要，但诸如资金定向或法院干预等因素无法解释现有的结果模式。
31653.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H4, I22, J24

31652.title: Price Discrimination and Mortgage Choice
31652.zh_title: 价格歧视与抵押贷款选择
31652.authors: Jamie Coen, Anil K Kashyap, May Rostom
31652.abstract: We characterize the large number of mortgage offers for which people qualify in the United Kingdom. Very few pick the cheapest option, nonetheless the one selected is not usually noticeably more expensive. A few borrowers make very expensive choices. These are most common when the menu they face has many expensive options, and are most likely for high loan-to-value and loan-to-income borrowers. Young people and first-time buyers are more prone to making expensive choices. The dispersion in the mortgage menu is consistent with banks price discriminating for borrowers who might pick poorly, while competing for others who shop more effectively.
31652.zh_abstract: 我们刻画了英国人们有资格获得的大量抵押贷款报价。很少有人选择最便宜的选项，但所选选项通常不会明显更贵。少数借款人做出了非常昂贵的选择。当借款人面临的菜单包含许多昂贵选项时，这种情况最为常见，并且最可能发生在高贷款价值比和高贷款收入比的借款人身上。年轻人和首次购房者更容易做出昂贵的选择。抵押贷款菜单的分散性与银行对那些可能做出糟糕选择的借款人进行价格歧视，同时为其他更有效购物的借款人进行竞争是一致的。

31651.title: A Cognitive View of Policing
31651.authors: Oeindrila Dube, Sandy Jo MacArthur, Anuj K. Shah
31651.abstract: What causes adverse policing outcomes, such as excessive uses of force and unnecessary arrests? Prevailing explanations focus on problematic officers or deficient regulations and oversight. Here, we introduce a new, overlooked perspective. We suggest that the cognitive demands inherent in policing can undermine officer decision-making. Unless officers are prepared for these demands, they may jump to conclusions too quickly without fully considering alternative ways of seeing a situation. This can lead to adverse policing outcomes. To test this perspective, we created a new training that teaches officers to more deliberately consider different ways of interpreting the situations they encounter. We evaluated this training using a randomized controlled trial with 2,070 officers from the Chicago Police Department. In a series of lab assessments, we find that treated officers were significantly more likely to consider a wider range of evidence and develop more explanations for subjects' actions. Critically, we also find that training affected officer performance in the field, leading to reductions in uses of force, discretionary arrests, and arrests of Black civilians. Meanwhile, officer activity levels remained unchanged, and trained officers were less likely to be injured on duty. Our results highlight the value of considering the cognitive aspects of policing and demonstrate the power of using behaviorally informed approaches to improve officer decision-making and policing outcomes.
31651.zh_abstract: 是什么导致了不良的警务结果，例如过度使用武力和不必要的逮捕？主流的解释聚焦于有问题的警官或监管与监督的不足。在此，我们引入一个被忽视的新视角。我们认为，警务工作固有的认知需求可能损害警官的决策能力。除非警官对这些需求有所准备，否则他们可能在没有充分考虑理解情境的其他方式的情况下，过快地下结论。这可能导致不良的警务结果。为了检验这一视角，我们创建了一项新的培训，教导警官更审慎地考虑解读他们所遇到情境的不同方式。我们通过一项随机对照试验评估了这项培训，试验对象为来自芝加哥警察局的2070名警官。在一系列实验室评估中，我们发现接受培训的警官更有可能考虑更广泛的证据，并对受试者的行为提出更多解释。关键的是，我们还发现培训影响了警官在现场的表现，导致使用武力、酌情逮捕以及逮捕黑人平民的情况减少。与此同时，警官的活动水平保持不变，且接受培训的警官在执勤时受伤的可能性更低。我们的结果凸显了考虑警务认知方面的价值，并展示了使用行为知情方法来改善警官决策和警务结果的力量。
31651.meta: Programs：LE, LS, POL；JEL：C91, C93, D03, D91, J08, K40, K42

31699.title: The Effect of Multitasking on Educational Outcomes and Academic Dishonesty
31699.zh_title: 多任务处理对教育成果与学术不端行为的影响
31699.abstract: School authorities, universities, and employers often schedule multiple tests on the same day or week, causing overlapping exam preparation and a dense testing schedule. This multitask learning can be intense, under pressure, and challenge the student’s mental and physical perseverance. As a result, it can compromise performance relative to a more ‘relaxed’ schedule. This paper examines the consequences of multitasking for test scores and cheating in exams and its implications for the ability and gender cognitive gap. The empirical context is high-stakes exit exams in Israel, done at the end of high school. I leverage the empirical setting on two natural experiments to estimate the causal effect of this multitasking learning. The first exploits random variation in the number of weekly tests—the second hinges on days with multiple exams versus days with a single exam. The results show several important regularities. First, the number of exams in a day or a week harms test performance. Second, these effects are evidenced for high- and low-ability students, both boys and girls. They are much more extensive for immigrants than natives. Third, the harm of such multitasking is larger in tests later in the schedule, daily or weekly. Fourth, these effects are larger in tests of STEM subjects. Fifth, dense exam schedules increase the likelihood of students behaving dishonestly in exams.
31699.zh_abstract: 学校当局、大学和雇主经常在同一天或同一周安排多场考试，导致备考时间重叠和考试日程密集。这种多任务学习可能强度大、压力高，考验学生的身心毅力。因此，与更“宽松”的日程相比，它可能损害表现。本文考察了多任务处理对考试成绩和考试作弊的影响，及其对能力和性别认知差距的含义。实证背景是以色列高中结束时进行的高风险毕业考试。我利用两个自然实验的实证设定来估计这种多任务学习的因果效应。第一个实验利用了每周考试次数的随机变化，第二个实验则基于多科考试日与单科考试日的对比。结果显示了几个重要的规律性。首先，一天或一周内的考试次数会损害考试表现。其次，这些效应在高能力和低能力学生、男生和女生中均有体现，且对移民的影响远大于本地学生。第三，这种多任务处理的损害在每日或每周日程中较晚进行的考试中更大。第四，这些效应在STEM科目的考试中更大。第五，密集的考试日程增加了学生在考试中行为不诚实的可能性。

31698.title: Monetary Policy and Innovation
31698.abstract: We document that monetary policy has a substantial impact on innovation activities. After a tightening shock of 100 basis points, research and development (R&D) spending declines by about 1 to 3 percent and venture capital (VC) investment declines by about 25 percent in the following 1 to 3 years. Patenting in important technologies, as well as a patent-based aggregate innovation index, declines by up to 9 percent in the following 2 to 4 years. Based on previous estimates of the sensitivity of output to innovation activities, these magnitudes imply that output could be 1 percent lower after another 5 years. Monetary policy can influence innovation activities by changing aggregate demand and correspondingly the profitability of innovation, and by changing financial market conditions. Both channels appear relevant in the data. Our findings suggest that monetary policy may affect the productive capacity of the economy in the longer term, in addition to the well-recognized near-term effects on economic outcomes.
31698.zh_abstract: 我们记录了货币政策对创新活动具有显著影响。在100个基点的紧缩冲击之后，研发支出在随后1至3年内下降约1%至3%，风险投资在随后1至3年内下降约25%。重要技术领域的专利申请以及基于专利的综合创新指数在随后2至4年内下降高达9%。根据先前关于产出对创新活动敏感性的估计，这些幅度意味着产出可能在再经过5年后降低1%。货币政策可以通过改变总需求并相应改变创新的盈利能力，以及通过改变金融市场状况来影响创新活动。这两个渠道在数据中似乎都相关。我们的发现表明，除了公认的对经济结果的短期影响外，货币政策还可能影响经济的长期生产能力。
31698.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME, PR；JEL：E2, E5, G31, O3

31697.title: You Can Lead a Horse to Water: Spatial Learning and Path Dependence in Consumer Search
31697.zh_title: 你可以把马牵到水边：空间学习与消费者搜索中的路径依赖
31697.abstract: We develop and estimate a model of consumer search with spatial learning. Consumers make inferences from previously searched objects to unsearched objects that are nearby in attribute space, generating path dependence in search sequences. The estimated model rationalizes patterns in data on online consumer search paths: search tends to converge to the chosen product in attribute space, and consumers take larger steps away from rarely purchased products. Eliminating spatial learning reduces consumer welfare by 13%: cross-product inferences allow consumers to locate better products in a shorter time. Spatial learning has important implications for product recommendations on retail platforms. We show that consumer welfare can be reduced by unrepresentative product recommendations and that consumer-optimal product recommendations depend both on consumer learning and competition between platforms.
31697.zh_abstract: 我们开发并估计了一个包含空间学习的消费者搜索模型。消费者从先前搜索过的对象推断属性空间中附近未搜索对象的信息，从而在搜索序列中产生路径依赖。估计模型合理化了在线消费者搜索路径数据中的模式：搜索在属性空间中趋向于收敛到所选产品，并且消费者会从很少购买的产品处迈出更大的步伐。消除空间学习会使消费者福利降低13%：跨产品推断使消费者能够在更短时间内定位到更好的产品。空间学习对零售平台上的产品推荐具有重要影响。我们表明，不具代表性的产品推荐会降低消费者福利，并且消费者最优的产品推荐既取决于消费者学习，也取决于平台之间的竞争。

31696.title: Mobile Money, Interoperability, and Financial Inclusion
31696.zh_title: 移动货币、互操作性及金融包容性
31696.authors: Markus K. Brunnermeier, Nicola Limodio, Lorenzo Spadavecchia
31696.abstract: This paper investigates the tradeoff between competition and financial inclusion resulting from the vertical integration between mobile network and money operators. Joining newly assembled data on mobile money fees through the WayBack machine, with sources on network coverage and financials, we examine the staggering across African operators and countries of platform interoperability – a policy that promotes transactions and competition across mobile money operators. Our results show that interoperability benefits users by lowering mobile money fees and their dispersion across operators. However, these positive effects are offset by a decrease in mobile towers and network coverage, especially in rural and poor districts, which, in turn, leads to a lower financial inclusion. We note that combining interoperability with subsidies for rural telecommunications delivers lower fees without hurting coverage.
31696.zh_abstract: 本文研究了移动网络运营商与移动货币运营商之间垂直整合所导致的竞争与金融包容性之间的权衡。通过结合利用WayBack机器收集的移动货币费用新汇编数据，以及网络覆盖和财务数据来源，我们考察了平台互操作性（一项促进移动货币运营商之间交易和竞争的政策）在非洲各运营商和国家间的显著差异。我们的结果表明，互操作性通过降低移动货币费用及其在运营商之间的离散度使用户受益。然而，这些积极效应被移动基站和网络覆盖的减少所抵消，尤其是在农村和贫困地区，这进而导致金融包容性降低。我们注意到，将互操作性与农村电信补贴相结合，可以在不损害覆盖范围的情况下降低费用。

31695.title: Intergenerational Mobility of Daughters and Marital Sorting: New Evidence from Imperial China
31695.zh_title: 女儿的代际流动性与婚姻匹配：来自中华帝国的新证据
31695.abstract: We study the role of marriage for women's intergenerational mobility during the Ming-Qing (1368-1911) period. Using status information based on the timing of marriage from family histories in Central China, already in the early 1500s it is the case that daughters from rich families attain higher status over their lifetime than daughters from poorer families. This intergenerational status persistence is partly due to marital sorting because daughters from high-status families tend to become the wives of sons who themselves come from rich families. Quantitatively, the correlation of 0.6 between the status of biological and in-law families means that marriage accounts for more than one third of total intergenerational status transmission, while not accounting for marriage overestimates mobility by more than 20 percent. Further underscoring the importance of marriage, typically the status of the in-law family plays a larger role for intergenerational status transmission than the child's biological grandparents. Over the period 1500 to 1900, the degree of marital sorting falls, as does intergenerational persistence. Lower investments in the marriage market to find a good match for a daughter go hand in hand with the fall in the returns to son education due to the decline of China's civil service examination.
31695.zh_abstract: 我们研究了明清时期（1368-1911年）婚姻对女性代际流动性的作用。利用中国中部家族史中基于婚姻时机的地位信息，早在16世纪初，富裕家庭的女儿一生中获得的地位就高于贫困家庭的女儿。这种代际地位持续性部分归因于婚姻匹配，因为高地位家庭的女儿往往成为同样来自富裕家庭的儿子的妻子。从数量上看，生身家庭与姻亲家庭地位之间0.6的相关性意味着，婚姻占代际地位总传递的三分之一以上，而不考虑婚姻会高估流动性超过20%。进一步凸显婚姻重要性的是，通常姻亲家庭的地位对代际地位传递的作用大于孩子的生身祖父母。在1500年至1900年期间，婚姻匹配程度下降，代际持续性也随之下降。为女儿在婚姻市场上寻找良配的投资减少，与科举制度衰落导致儿子教育回报下降是同步发生的。

31694.title: High-Quality Early-Childhood Education at Scale: Evidence from a Multisite Randomized Trial
31694.zh_title: 大规模高质量早期儿童教育：来自多地点随机试验的证据
31694.authors: William R. Dougan, Jorge Luis García, Illia Polovnikov
31694.abstract: We offer a new analysis of a large-scale trial of an early-childhood education program that targeted premature, low-birthweight children. This targeting heavily oversampled twins, whose outcomes differed significantly from singletons’. Singletons’ gains in short-term cognition and age-18 non-cognitive skills were comparable to those of the Perry Preschool and Carolina Abecedarian Projects, supporting those programs’ scalability. For twins, however, the program generated smaller positive short-term gains and negative age-18 impacts. These outcome differences arise from differences in parents’ response to the program. A household production model suggests that the possibility of jointly supplying parenting to twins helps explain those differences.
31694.zh_abstract: 我们对一项针对早产、低出生体重儿童的大规模早期儿童教育项目进行了新的分析。这种针对性抽样严重过度代表了双胞胎，其结果与单胞胎存在显著差异。单胞胎在短期认知能力和18岁时非认知能力方面的收益与佩里学前项目和卡罗来纳初学者项目相当，支持了这些项目的可扩展性。然而，对于双胞胎，该项目产生了较小的短期正向收益和18岁时的负向影响。这些结果差异源于父母对该项目反应的差异。一个家庭生产模型表明，共同为双胞胎提供养育的可能性有助于解释这些差异。
31694.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：C93, H83, I28, J13

31693.title: The Reserve Supply Channel of Unconventional Monetary Policy
31693.zh_title: 非常规货币政策的准备金供给渠道
31693.authors: William F. Diamond, Zhengyang Jiang, Yiming Ma
31693.abstract: We find that central bank reserves injected by QE crowd out bank lending. We estimate a structural model with cross-sectional instrumental variables for deposit and loan demand. Our results are determined by the elasticity of loan demand and the impact of reserve holdings on the cost of supplying loans. The reserves injected by QE raise loan rates by 8.2 basis points, and each dollar of reserves reduces bank lending by 8.1 cents. Our results imply that a large injection of central bank reserves has the unintended consequence of crowding out bank loans because of bank balance sheet costs.
31693.zh_abstract: 我们发现，量化宽松注入的中央银行准备金挤出了银行贷款。我们使用存款和贷款需求的横截面工具变量估计了一个结构模型。我们的结果由贷款需求的弹性以及准备金持有对贷款供给成本的影响决定。量化宽松注入的准备金使贷款利率提高了8.2个基点，每1美元准备金使银行贷款减少8.1美分。我们的结果表明，由于银行资产负债表成本，大量注入中央银行准备金会产生挤出银行贷款的意外后果。

31692.title: Consumer Surveillance and Financial Fraud
31692.zh_title: 消费者监控与金融欺诈
31692.authors: Bo Bian, Michaela Pagel, Huan Tang, Devesh Raval
31692.abstract: In today’s digital economy, firms continuously collect, store, share, and sell personal data, exposing customers to risks of financial fraud. Leveraging Apple’s App Tracking Transparency policy as a natural experiment, we show that restricting data tracking and sharing significantly reduces consumer fraud complaints, particularly those involving personal information misuse. Effects are stronger in areas dominated by firms with risky data practices and coincide with a decline in dark web discussions and higher prices for sensitive data. By tracing effects along the fraud supply chain, our findings suggest that data regulation can reduce a consumer harm that firms may not fully internalize.
31692.zh_abstract: 在当今的数字经济中，企业持续收集、存储、共享和出售个人数据，使客户面临金融欺诈风险。利用苹果公司的应用跟踪透明度政策作为自然实验，我们表明限制数据跟踪和共享显著减少了消费者欺诈投诉，特别是涉及个人信息滥用的投诉。在由具有高风险数据实践的企业主导的地区，效应更强，并且与暗网讨论减少和敏感数据价格上涨同时发生。通过追踪欺诈供应链上的效应，我们的发现表明，数据监管可以减少企业可能未完全内部化的消费者损害。

31691.title: Provider Payment Incentives: Evidence From The U.S. Hospice Industry
31691.zh_title: 医疗服务提供者支付激励：来自美国临终关怀行业的证据
31691.abstract: Moral hazard and provider-induced demand may contribute to overutilization of scarce health care resources. The U.S. health care system includes several compensatory cost-containment mechanisms, but their effects depend on how patients and providers respond. We investigate hospice programs’ responses to a cap in the Medicare hospice benefit on their average annual payments per patient. We estimate their intensive margin responses to the cap by leveraging variation in cap-related financial incentives generated by the policy’s nonlinear design and the transition between fiscal years. We find that programs on track to exceed the cap in the last three months of a fiscal year raise their enrollment rates by 5.7% and their live discharge rates by 4.3% on average, reducing their cap liabilities. The marginal enrollees have longer average remaining lifetimes and are less likely to have been recently hospitalized. Their hospice spells are also more likely to be fragmented by subsequent live discharges. On the extensive margin, we find that cap liabilities are associated with terminations of Medicare provider certification numbers, suggesting that the cap impacts market structure. Current policy discussions about reducing the cap should consider its potential effect on market structure.
31691.zh_abstract: 道德风险和提供者诱导需求可能导致稀缺医疗资源的过度利用。美国医疗体系包含若干补偿性成本控制机制，但其效果取决于患者和提供者的反应。我们研究了临终关怀项目对医疗保险临终关怀福利中每位患者年均支付上限的应对行为。通过利用政策非线性设计及财政年度过渡所产生的与上限相关的财务激励差异，我们估计了项目在集约边际上的反应。研究发现，在财政年度最后三个月内预计将超出上限的项目，其平均入院率提高5.7%，活体出院率提高4.3%，从而减少了其上限负债。边际入院患者的平均剩余寿命更长，且近期住院的可能性更低。他们的临终关怀期也更可能因随后的活体出院而变得碎片化。在广延边际上，我们发现上限负债与医疗保险提供者认证编号的终止相关，表明上限影响了市场结构。当前关于降低上限的政策讨论应考虑其对市场结构的潜在影响。

31690.title: Can Patience Account for Subnational Differences in Student Achievement? Regional Analysis with Facebook Interests
31690.zh_title: 耐心能否解释学生成绩的次国家差异？基于Facebook兴趣的区域分析
31690.authors: Eric A. Hanushek, Lavinia Kinne, Pietro Sancassani, Ludger Woessmann
31690.abstract: Decisions to invest in human capital depend on people’s time preferences. We show that differences in patience are closely related to substantial subnational differences in educational achievement, leading to new perspectives on longstanding within-country disparities. We use social-media data – Facebook interests – to construct novel regional measures of patience within Italy and the United States. Patience is strongly positively associated with student achievement in both countries, accounting for two-thirds of the achievement variation across Italian regions and one-third across U.S. states. Results also hold for six other countries with more limited regional achievement data.
31690.zh_abstract: 人力资本投资决策取决于人们的时间偏好。我们表明，耐心程度的差异与教育成就的显著次国家差异密切相关，从而为长期存在的国内差异提供了新视角。我们利用社交媒体数据——Facebook兴趣——构建了意大利和美国境内耐心的新型区域度量指标。在这两个国家，耐心与学生成绩呈强烈正相关，分别解释了意大利各地区成绩变动的三分之二和美国各州成绩变动的三分之一。对于其他六个拥有有限区域成绩数据的国家，结果同样成立。
31690.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I21, J24, Z10

31689.title: Complexity in Factor Pricing Models
31689.zh_title: 因子定价模型中的复杂性
31689.authors: Antoine Didisheim, Shikun (Barry) Ke, Bryan T. Kelly, Semyon Malamud
31689.abstract: We theoretically characterize the behavior of machine learning asset pricing models. We prove that expected out-of-sample model performance—in terms of SDF Sharpe ratio and test asset pricing errors—is improving in model parameterization (or “complexity”). Our empirical findings verify the theoretically predicted “virtue of complexity” in the cross-section of stock returns. Models with an extremely large number of factors (more than the number of training observations or base assets) outperform simpler alternatives by a large margin.
31689.zh_abstract: 我们从理论上刻画了机器学习资产定价模型的行为。我们证明，预期的样本外模型表现——以随机贴现因子夏普比率和测试资产定价误差衡量——随模型参数化程度（或“复杂性”）而改善。我们的实证结果验证了股票收益率横截面上理论上预测的“复杂性美德”。具有极大量因子（超过训练观测值或基础资产数量）的模型以较大优势优于更简单的替代模型。
31689.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C1, C4, C58, G1, G10, G12, G14, G17

31688.title: Zero-sum Thinking and the Roots of US Political Differences
31688.zh_title: 零和思维与美国政治分歧的根源
31688.authors: Sahil Chinoy, Nathan Nunn, Sandra Sequeira, Stefanie Stantcheva
31688.abstract: We investigate the origins and implications of zero-sum thinking: the belief that gains for one individual or group tend to come at the cost of others. Using a new survey of 20,400 U.S. residents, we measure zero-sum thinking, political preferences, policy views, and a rich array of ancestral information spanning four generations. We find that a more zero-sum mindset is strongly associated with more support for government redistribution, race- and gender-based affirmative action, and more restrictive immigration policies. Zero-sum thinking can be traced back to the experiences of both the individual and their ancestors, encompassing factors such as the degree of intergenerational upward mobility they experienced, whether they immigrated to the United States or lived in a location with more immigrants, and whether they were enslaved or lived in a location with more enslavement.
31688.zh_abstract: 我们研究了零和思维的起源与影响：即认为一个个体或群体的收益往往以牺牲他人为代价的信念。通过对20,400名美国居民进行新调查，我们衡量了零和思维、政治偏好、政策观点以及跨越四代的丰富祖先信息。我们发现，更强的零和心态与更支持政府再分配、基于种族和性别的平权行动以及更严格的移民政策密切相关。零和思维可以追溯到个体及其祖先的经历，包括他们经历代际向上流动的程度、是否移民到美国或居住在移民较多的地区，以及是否曾被奴役或居住在奴役较多的地区。

31687.title: Forward Return Expectations
31687.authors: Mihir Gandhi, Niels Joachim Gormsen, Eben Lazarus
31687.abstract: We measure investors’ short- and long-term stock-return expectations using both options and survey data. These expectations at different horizons reveal what investors think their own short-term expectations will be in the future, or forward return expectations. While contemporaneous short-term expectations are not countercyclical across all data sources, we find that forward expectations are consistently countercyclical, and excessively so: in bad times, forward expectations are higher than justified by investors’ own subsequent short-term return expectations. This excess volatility in forward expectations helps account for excess volatility in prices, inelastic demand for equities, and stylized facts about the equity term structure.
31687.zh_abstract: 我们利用期权和调查数据衡量投资者的短期和长期股票回报预期。这些不同期限的预期揭示了投资者认为他们自己未来的短期预期将是什么，即远期回报预期。虽然同期短期预期并非在所有数据来源中都呈现逆周期性，但我们发现远期预期始终是逆周期的，并且过度如此：在经济不景气时期，远期预期高于投资者自己随后的短期回报预期所证明的水平。远期预期的这种过度波动有助于解释价格中的过度波动、股票需求缺乏弹性以及股票期限结构的典型事实。
31687.meta: Programs：AP, IFM；JEL：G0, G01, G1, G10, G11, G12, G13, G14, G17, G4

31686.title: The Evolution of Work from Home
31686.authors: Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis
31686.abstract: Full days worked at home account for 28 percent of paid workdays among Americans 20-64 years old, as of mid 2023, according to the Survey of Working Arrangements and Attitudes. That’s about four times the 2019 rate and ten times the rate in the mid-1990s that we estimate in time-use data. We first explain why the big shift to work from home has endured rather than reverting to pre-pandemic levels. We then consider how work-from-home rates vary by worker age, sex, education, parental status, industry and local population density, and why it is higher in the United States than other countries. We also discuss some implications of the big shift for pay, productivity, and the pace of innovation. Over the next five years, U.S. business executives anticipate modest increases in the share of fully remote jobs at their own companies and in the share of jobs with hybrid arrangements, whereby the employee splits the workweek between home and employer premises. Other factors that portend an enduring shift to work from home include the ongoing adaptation of managerial practices and further advances in technologies, products, and tools that support remote work.
31686.zh_abstract: 根据工作安排与态度调查，截至2023年中，全职居家工作日占美国20-64岁人群带薪工作日的28%。这大约是2019年水平的四倍，是我们根据时间使用数据估算的1990年代中期水平的十倍。我们首先解释了为何向居家办公的重大转变得以持续，而非回归疫情前水平。然后，我们考察了居家办公率如何因工人年龄、性别、教育程度、父母身份、行业和当地人口密度而异，以及为何美国高于其他国家。我们还讨论了这一重大转变对薪酬、生产力和创新速度的一些影响。未来五年，美国企业高管预计，其公司内部完全远程工作岗位的比例以及混合工作安排（员工每周在家庭和雇主场所之间分配工作时间）岗位的比例将适度增加。其他预示居家办公持久转变的因素包括管理实践的持续适应以及支持远程工作的技术、产品和工具的进一步进步。
31686.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：D13, D23, E24, J22, J31, M54, R3

31685.title: The State Capacity Ceiling on Tax Rates: Evidence from Randomized Tax Abatements in the DRC
31685.zh_title: 国家能力对税率的限制：来自刚果民主共和国随机税收减免的证据
31685.authors: Augustin Bergeron, Gabriel Z. Tourek, Jonathan L. Weigel
31685.abstract: This paper investigates how tax rates and tax enforcement jointly impact fiscal capacity in low-income countries. We study a policy experiment in the D.R. Congo that randomly assigned 38,028 property owners to the status quo tax rate or to a rate reduction. This variation in tax liabilities reveals that the status quo rate lies above the revenue-maximizing tax rate (RMTR). Reducing rates by about one-third would maximize government revenue by increasing tax compliance. We then exploit two sources of variation in enforcement — randomized enforcement letters and random assignment of tax collectors — to show that the RMTR increases with enforcement. Including an enforcement message on tax letters or replacing tax collectors in the bottom quartile of enforcement capacity with average collectors would raise the RMTR by about 40%. Tax rates and enforcement are thus complementary levers. Jointly optimizing tax rates and enforcement would lead to 10% higher revenue gains than optimizing them independently. These findings provide experimental evidence that low government enforcement capacity sets a binding ceiling on the revenue-maximizing tax rate in some developing countries, thereby demonstrating the value of increasing tax rates in tandem with enforcement to expand fiscal capacity.
31685.zh_abstract: 本文研究了税率和税收执法如何共同影响低收入国家的财政能力。我们研究了刚果民主共和国的一项政策实验，该实验将38,028名房产所有者随机分配到现行税率或税率降低组。这种税收负债的差异揭示，现行税率高于收入最大化税率。将税率降低约三分之一将通过提高税收合规性来最大化政府收入。然后，我们利用两种执法差异来源——随机化的执法信件和税务征收员的随机分配——来表明收入最大化税率随执法力度增强而提高。在税收信件中包含执法信息，或将执法能力处于最低四分位的税务征收员替换为平均水平征收员，将使收入最大化税率提高约40%。因此，税率和执法是互补的杠杆。联合优化税率和执法将比单独优化它们带来高出10%的收入增长。这些发现提供了实验证据，表明在一些发展中国家，低政府执法能力对收入最大化税率构成了一个具有约束力的上限，从而证明了同步提高税率和执法力度以扩大财政能力的价值。
31685.meta: Programs：DEV, PE；JEL：H11, H21, H26, H71, O12

31684.title: The Labor Market Consequences of Heat Exposure During Pregnancy
31684.zh_title: 孕期高温暴露的劳动力市场后果
31684.authors: Xuwen Gao, Ran Song, Christopher Timmins, Fang Xia
31684.abstract: We provide the first estimates of the negative impact of exposure to extremely high temperatures during pregnancy on mothers’ labor market outcomes. We employ individual-level survey data from China and leverage plausibly exogenous fluctuations in heat exposure within cities. The results demonstrate that exposure to extremely hot weather during pregnancy reduces women’s wages and labor supply later in life and increases the likelihood that they will work in an unskilled sector. The effects are stronger for heat exposure during the third gestational trimester. The mechanism for these results is that extreme temperature exposure during pregnancy undermines maternal health. Our analysis proposes a new channel through which extreme weather generates health and economic costs.
31684.zh_abstract: 我们首次估算了孕期暴露于极端高温对母亲劳动力市场结果的负面影响。我们采用来自中国的个体层面调查数据，并利用城市内高温暴露的外生波动。结果表明，孕期暴露于极端炎热天气会降低女性日后的工资和劳动力供给，并增加她们在非技能部门工作的可能性。这种效应在妊娠晚期的高温暴露中更为强烈。这些结果的机制在于，孕期极端温度暴露损害了母亲健康。我们的分析提出了一个极端天气产生健康和经济成本的新渠道。
31684.meta: Programs：EEE, EH, LS；JEL：I10, J22, J31, Q54

31683.title: Heterogeneous Real Estate Agents and the Housing Cycle
31683.zh_title: 异质性房地产经纪人及住房周期
31683.abstract: The real estate market is highly intermediated, with 90 percent of buyers and sellers hiring an agent to help them transact a house. However, low barriers to entry and fixed commission rates result in a market where inexperienced intermediaries have a large market share, especially following house price booms. Using rich micro-level data on 8.5 million listings and a novel instrumental variables research design, we first show that houses listed for sale by inexperienced real estate agents have a lower probability of selling, and this effect is strongest during the housing bust. We then study the aggregate implications of the distribution of agents' experience on housing market liquidity by building a dynamic entry and exit model of real estate agents with aggregate shocks. We find that 3.7 more listings would have been sold in a flexible commission equilibrium. It would require a six-fold increase in entry costs for real estate agents to achieve this level of liquidity within the fixed commission framework.
31683.zh_abstract: 房地产市场高度依赖中介，90%的买卖双方会雇佣经纪人协助完成房屋交易。然而，低准入门槛和固定佣金率导致经验不足的中介占据较大市场份额，尤其是在房价繁荣期之后。利用包含850万条挂牌记录的丰富微观数据及新颖的工具变量研究设计，我们首先发现，由缺乏经验的房地产经纪人挂牌出售的房屋成交概率更低，且这一效应在房市萧条期最为显著。随后，我们通过构建一个包含总体冲击的房地产经纪人动态进入与退出模型，研究了经纪人经验分布对住房市场流动性的总体影响。研究发现，在灵活佣金均衡下，将多售出3.7套挂牌房屋。若要在固定佣金框架内实现这一流动性水平，房地产经纪人的进入成本需提高六倍。

31682.title: Selection into Financial Education and Effects on Portfolio Choice
31682.zh_title: 金融教育的自我选择及其对投资组合选择的影响
31682.authors: Irina Gemmo, Pierre-Carl Michaud, Olivia S. Mitchell
31682.abstract: We study the effect of a financial education intervention on portfolio choices in a unique incentivized setting that allows us to investigate selection into the intervention and treatment effect heterogeneity. After directly eliciting willingness to pay for the financial education, we find that the more financially literate, those confident they can apply the knowledge acquired in the intervention, and those expecting higher returns are willing to pay more. Using portfolio allocation tasks, we show that the financial education leads to better outcomes according to welfare metrics tailored to respondent risk aversion: there is a 20 p.p. increase in the fraction with a welfare gain, representing on average 3.2 p.p. of wealth. Those most willing to participate are those who gain the most from the education, which has important implications for the design of financial education across a variety of settings.
31682.zh_abstract: 我们在一个独特的激励性环境中研究了金融教育干预对投资组合选择的影响，该环境使我们能够考察干预的自我选择效应及处理效应的异质性。在直接询问参与者对金融教育的支付意愿后，我们发现，金融素养更高、自信能运用所学知识以及预期回报更高的人支付意愿更强。通过投资组合分配任务，我们证明，根据针对受访者风险厌恶程度定制的福利指标，金融教育能带来更好的结果：获得福利改善的人群比例提高了20个百分点，平均相当于财富的3.2个百分点。最愿意参与的人正是从教育中获益最多的人，这对在不同情境下设计金融教育具有重要启示。

31681.title: Mistrust, Misperception, and Misunderstanding: Imperfect Information and Conflict Dynamics
31681.zh_title: 不信任、误解与误判：不完全信息与冲突动态
31681.abstract: Building on theories of international relations, we analyze how mistrust (uncertainty about an adversary's preferences or capabilities), misperception (imperfect observation of an adversary's actions), and misunderstanding (non-degenerate higher-order beliefs) can lead to conflict and drive its dynamics. We develop our analysis in the context of three classic models: a one-shot security dilemma or spiral model; a repeated version of the security dilemma that allows for gradual learning about the opponent's type, as well as the possibility of conflict spirals, traps, and cycles; and a deterrence model. We relate these models to the empirical literature and to current and historical episodes of conflict.
31681.zh_abstract: 基于国际关系理论，我们分析了不信任（对对手偏好或能力的不确定性）、误解（对对手行动的不完全观察）和误判（非退化的高阶信念）如何导致冲突并驱动其动态变化。我们通过三个经典模型展开分析：一次性安全困境或螺旋模型；允许逐步学习对手类型、并可能引发冲突螺旋、陷阱和周期的重复安全困境模型；以及威慑模型。我们将这些模型与实证文献以及当前和历史上的冲突事件联系起来。

31680.title: Estimating the Effects of Government Spending Through the Production Network
31680.zh_title: 通过生产网络估算政府支出的效应
31680.authors: Alessandro Barattieri, Matteo Cacciatore, Nora Traum
31680.abstract: We estimate the effects of government spending along the supply chain using disaggregated U.S. government procurement data. We first identify sectoral public spending shocks and combine them with input-output tables to measure upstream and downstream exposure through the production network. We then estimate panel local projections and find that sector-specific government purchases have sizable effects both in industries that receive procurement contracts and industries across the supply chain. Employment increases significantly in recipient industries and in sectors supplying intermediate inputs to these industries, while employment decreases downstream. The response of prices and wages suggest higher intermediate-input demand by recipient industries translates into higher intermediate-input prices across the network, accounting for the crowding out of downstream employment. We then estimate the aggregate implications of sectoral shocks and the influence of sectoral heterogeneity using a granular instrumental variable approach. Consistent with existing models, we find that aggregate effects are higher when recipient sectors are more downstream, have stickier prices, and when the government accounts for most of the recipient's total sales.
31680.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国政府采购的细分数据，估算了政府支出沿供应链产生的效应。我们首先识别出部门层面的公共支出冲击，并将其与投入产出表相结合，以衡量通过生产网络产生的上游和下游暴露程度。随后，我们估计了面板局部投影，发现特定部门的政府采购对获得采购合同的行业以及供应链上的行业均有显著影响。在接收行业以及向这些行业提供中间投入的部门中，就业显著增加，而下游行业的就业则减少。价格和工资的反应表明，接收行业对中间投入需求的增加会转化为整个网络中中间投入品价格的上涨，从而解释了下游就业的挤出效应。接着，我们利用颗粒化工具变量方法估算了部门冲击的总体影响以及部门异质性的作用。与现有模型一致，我们发现，当接收部门更处于下游、价格粘性更强，且政府占接收部门总销售额比重更大时，总体效应更高。

31679.title: Generation Next: Experimentation with AI
31679.zh_title: 下一代：人工智能的实验应用
31679.authors: Gary Charness, Brian Jabarian, John A. List
31679.abstract: We investigate the potential for Large Language Models (LLMs) to enhance scientific practice within experimentation by identifying key areas, directions, and implications. First, we discuss how these models can improve experimental design, including improving the elicitation wording, coding experiments, and producing documentation. Second, we delve into the use of LLMs in experiment implementation, with an emphasis on bolstering causal inference through creating consistent experiences, improving instruction comprehension, and real-time monitoring of participant engagement. Third, we underscore the role of LLMs in analyzing experimental data, encompassing tasks like pre-processing, data cleaning, and assisting reviewers and replicators in examining studies. Each of these tasks improves the probability of reporting accurate findings. Lastly, we suggest a scientific governance framework that mitigates the potential risks of using LLMs in experimental research while amplifying their advantages. This could pave the way for open science opportunities and foster a culture of policy and industry experimentation at scale.
31679.zh_abstract: 我们研究了大型语言模型在实验科学中提升实践水平的潜力，识别了关键领域、方向及影响。首先，我们讨论了这些模型如何改进实验设计，包括优化问题措辞、编写实验代码以及生成文档。其次，我们深入探讨了大型语言模型在实验实施中的应用，重点在于通过创造一致的体验、提高指令理解度以及实时监控参与者参与度来增强因果推断。第三，我们强调了大型语言模型在分析实验数据中的作用，涵盖数据预处理、数据清洗以及协助审稿人和复制者检查研究等任务。这些任务均能提高报告准确发现的可能性。最后，我们提出了一个科学治理框架，该框架在放大大型语言模型优势的同时，降低了其在实验研究中使用的潜在风险。这可为开放科学机会铺平道路，并培育大规模政策与行业实验的文化。
31679.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：C0, C1, C80, C82, C87, C9, C90, C92, C99

31678.title: Police Discretion and Public Safety
31678.zh_title: 警察自由裁量权与公共安全
31678.abstract: We study the implications of police discretion for public safety. Highway patrol officers exercise discretion over fines by deviating from statutory fine rules. Relying on variation across officers in this discretionary behavior, we find that harsher sanctions reduce future traffic offending and crash involvement. We then show that officer discretion over sanctions decreases public safety by comparing observed reoffending rates with those in a counterfactual without discretion, estimated using an identification at infinity approach. About half the safety cost of discretion is due to officer decisions which result in harsh sanctions for motorists who are least deterred by them. We provide evidence that this officer behavior is attributable to a preference for allocating harsh fines to motorists with higher recidivism risk, who are also the least responsive to harsher sanctions.
31678.zh_abstract: 我们研究了警察自由裁量权对公共安全的影响。高速公路巡警通过偏离法定罚款规则来行使罚款自由裁量权。利用不同警官在此类自由裁量行为上的差异，我们发现更严厉的处罚会减少未来的交通违法行为和事故发生率。随后，我们通过将观察到的再犯率与使用无穷远识别法估算的无自由裁量权反事实情况下的再犯率进行比较，证明警官对处罚的自由裁量权降低了公共安全。自由裁量权带来的安全成本中，约有一半源于警官的决策，这些决策导致对最不易被威慑的驾驶者施加严厉处罚。我们提供的证据表明，这种警官行为可归因于他们倾向于将严厉罚款分配给再犯风险更高、同时对严厉处罚反应最不敏感的驾驶者。
31678.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D73, J45, K42

31677.title: Quantifying Lottery Choice Complexity
31677.zh_title: 量化彩票选择问题的复杂性
31677.abstract: We develop interpretable, quantitative indices of the objective and subjective complexity of lottery choice problems that can be computed for any standard dataset. These indices capture the predicted error rate in identifying the lottery with the highest expected value, where the predictions are computed as convex combinations of choice set features. The most important complexity feature in the indices is a measure of the excess dissimilarity of the cumulative distribution functions of the lotteries in the set. Using our complexity indices, we study behavioral responses to complexity out-of-sample across one million decisions in 11,000 unique experimental choice problems. Complexity makes choices substantially noisier, which can generate systematic biases in revealed preference measures such as spurious risk aversion. These effects are very large, to the degree that complexity explains a larger fraction of estimated choice errors than proximity to indifference. Accounting for complexity in structural estimations improves model fit substantially.
31677.zh_abstract: 我们开发了可解释的、定量的指数，用于衡量彩票选择问题的客观和主观复杂性，这些指数可针对任何标准数据集进行计算。这些指数捕捉了识别具有最高期望值的彩票时的预测错误率，其中预测值被计算为选择集特征的凸组合。指数中最重要的复杂性特征是集合中彩票累积分布函数超额差异性的度量。利用我们的复杂性指数，我们研究了在11000个独特实验选择问题中超过一百万次决策的样本外复杂性行为反应。复杂性使选择变得显著更加嘈杂，这可能在揭示偏好度量中产生系统性偏差，例如虚假的风险厌恶。这些效应非常巨大，以至于复杂性解释的估计选择错误比例超过了接近无差异所解释的比例。在结构估计中考虑复杂性可以显著改善模型拟合度。

31676.title: Exporting the Surveillance State via Trade in AI
31676.zh_title: 通过人工智能贸易输出监控国家
31676.authors: Martin Beraja, Andrew Kao, David Y. Yang, Noam Yuchtman
31676.abstract: We document three facts about the global diffusion of surveillance AI technology, and in particular, the role played by China. First, China has a comparative advantage in this technology. It is substantially more likely to export surveillance AI than other countries, and particularly so as compared to other frontier technologies. Second, autocracies and weak democracies are more likely to import surveillance AI from China. This bias is not observed in AI imports from the US or in imports of other frontier technologies from China. Third, autocracies and weak democracies are especially more likely to import China’s surveillance AI in years of domestic unrest. Such imports coincide with declines in domestic institutional quality more broadly. To the extent that China may be exporting its surveillance state via trade in AI, this can enhance and beget more autocracies abroad. This possibility challenges the view that economic integration is necessarily associated with the diffusion of liberal institutions.
31676.zh_abstract: 我们记录了关于监控人工智能技术全球扩散的三个事实，特别是中国所扮演的角色。第一，中国在该技术上具有比较优势。与其他国家相比，中国出口监控人工智能的可能性显著更高，尤其是相较于其他前沿技术。第二，专制政体和弱民主国家更有可能从中国进口监控人工智能。这种偏向在美国的人工智能进口或从中国进口的其他前沿技术中并未观察到。第三，在国内动荡年份，专制政体和弱民主国家尤其更有可能进口中国的监控人工智能。此类进口与国内制度质量的更广泛下降同时发生。就中国可能通过人工智能贸易输出其监控国家而言，这可能会增强并在国外催生更多专制政体。这种可能性挑战了经济一体化必然与自由制度扩散相关联的观点。

31614.title: Cooking, health, and daily exposure to pollution spikes
31614.zh_title: 烹饪、健康与日常污染峰值暴露
31614.authors: Susanna B. Berkouwer, Joshua T. Dean
31614.abstract: Many routine daily activities—such as cooking and commuting—cause large recurring pollution spikes that may impact health without significantly affecting average exposure. We study pollution spikes by combining experimental variation in cooking technology with high-frequency data on individual pollution exposure and time-use in Kenya. Improved cookstoves reduce PM2.5 spikes while cooking by 51.3μg/m³ (41%) and cause a 0.24 standard deviation reduction in self-reported respiratory symptoms. However, even after more than three years of daily use, we find no clinical health improvements, possibly because we detect no impact on average exposure. Clinical health improvements may require reductions in ambient concentrations.\n
31614.zh_abstract: 许多日常活动——例如烹饪和通勤——会导致频繁出现的重大污染峰值，这些峰值可能在不显著影响平均暴露水平的情况下影响健康。我们通过结合烹饪技术的实验性变化与肯尼亚个人污染暴露和时间使用的高频数据，研究了污染峰值。改进的炉灶在烹饪期间将PM2.5峰值降低了51.3μg/m³（41%），并使自我报告的呼吸道症状减少了0.24个标准差。然而，即使在日常使用超过三年后，我们未发现临床健康改善，这可能是因为我们未检测到对平均暴露水平的影响。临床健康改善可能需要降低环境浓度。
